name.zh: 反射型 XSS 输出边界

description.zh: 反射型 XSS 输出边界保留可复现的攻击样例与绕过变体，仅修正已确认失效、占位或事实混淆的内容。所有样例只用于可回滚的授权实验，并要求浏览器、解析器、代理或服务端日志与可见结果一致。
description.en: Reflected XSS Output Boundary preserves reproducible attack samples and bypass variants while correcting only confirmed obsolete, placeholder, or factually conflated content. Every sample is restricted to a reversible authorized lab and requires browser, parser, proxy, or server logs to agree with the visible result.

subCategory.zh: 反射型 XSS 输出边界

prerequisites.zh: 确认 反射型 XSS 输出边界 的目标、账号、数据、组件版本和停止条件均属于可回滚的授权实验范围。
prerequisites.en: Confirm that the target, accounts, data, component version, and stop conditions for Reflected XSS Output Boundary are inside a reversible authorized lab scope.

prerequisites.zh: 准备正常输入、唯一标记、服务端日志和阴性对照；禁止扩展到非实验资产、真实凭据或不可回滚状态。
prerequisites.en: Prepare normal input, a unique marker, server logs, and a negative control; do not expand to non-lab assets, real credentials, or irreversible state.

overview.zh: 反射型 XSS 输出边界聚焦以下边界：验证请求参数是否未经上下文编码进入当前响应的可执行 HTML、属性或脚本位置。 审校保留原有可用攻击语法与技术变体，同时补充适用版本、授权实验范围、正常基线、检测证据和停止条件；只有已确认错误的样例才被替换。
overview.en: Reflected XSS Output Boundary focuses on this boundary: Tests whether a request parameter reaches executable HTML, attribute, or script context in the current response without contextual encoding. The review retains usable attack syntax and technical variants while adding version prerequisites, authorized-lab scope, normal baselines, detection evidence, and stop conditions; only confirmed incorrect samples are replaced.

vulnerability.zh: 风险来自不可信输入在输出时进入与其编码方式不匹配的浏览器上下文，或在 DOM 中流入可执行汇。黑名单、CSP、WAF 和字符串替换都不能替代按 HTML、属性、URL、CSS 或 JavaScript 上下文执行编码与净化。
vulnerability.en: Risk arises when untrusted input reaches a browser context whose output encoding does not match that context, or flows into an executable DOM sink. Blacklists, CSP, WAFs, and string replacement do not replace HTML, attribute, URL, CSS, or JavaScript contextual encoding and sanitization.

exploitation.zh: 在隔离页面中先渲染普通文本基线，再提交只设置 window 本地布尔标记的样例。阳性必须由最终 DOM、实际事件执行和浏览器控制台共同确认，并排除字符串回显、查看源代码、CSP 报告模式和浏览器扩展影响。
exploitation.en: Render a plain-text baseline in an isolated page, then submit a sample that only sets a local Boolean marker on window. Confirm a positive result with the final DOM, actual event execution, and browser console, excluding string reflection, view-source output, report-only CSP, and browser-extension effects.

mitigation.zh: 按最终输出上下文使用框架编码器，对允许富文本使用维护中的 HTML sanitizer，禁止不可信值进入危险 DOM 汇，并将 CSP 作为纵深防护。Cookie 使用 HttpOnly、Secure 与合适 SameSite，修复后重放文本、标记和阴性编码对照。
mitigation.en: Use framework encoders for the final output context, a maintained HTML sanitizer for permitted rich text, and prevent untrusted values from reaching dangerous DOM sinks, with CSP as defense in depth. Set HttpOnly, Secure, and appropriate SameSite on cookies, then replay text, marker, and negative encoding controls.

title.zh: 确认 反射型 XSS 输出边界 的适用入口
title.en: Confirm the Applicable Reflected XSS Output Boundary Entry Point

description.zh: 记录 反射型 XSS 输出边界 的组件版本、输入位置、执行主体、正常请求与服务端日志，确认当前夹具满足该技术的真实前置条件。
description.en: Record the component version, input location, execution principal, normal request, and server logs for Reflected XSS Output Boundary, confirming that the fixture satisfies its actual prerequisites.

title.zh: 运行 反射型 XSS 输出边界 单一授权样例
title.en: Run One Authorized Reflected XSS Output Boundary Sample

description.zh: 一次只运行第一条授权实验样例，并保存原始请求、响应、最终解析结果和对应日志；确认基线后再逐个验证其余变体。
description.en: Run only the first authorized-lab sample at a time and preserve the raw request, response, final parsed result, and matching logs; validate remaining variants one by one only after establishing the baseline.

title.zh: 关联 反射型 XSS 输出边界 的服务端证据
title.en: Correlate Server-Side Evidence for Reflected XSS Output Boundary

description.zh: 把唯一标记与解析器、代理、应用、数据库或浏览器证据按时间关联，并排除回显、缓存、重试、客户端修改和统一错误页。
description.en: Correlate the unique marker over time with parser, proxy, application, database, or browser evidence while excluding reflection, caching, retries, client modification, and generic error pages.

title.zh: 修复 反射型 XSS 输出边界 并重放基线
title.en: Remediate Reflected XSS Output Boundary and Replay the Baseline

description.zh: 应用最小边界修复后重放正常、标记和阴性样例，确认业务路径仍可用、服务端证据消失且没有引入新的解析差异。
description.en: Apply the smallest boundary fix and replay normal, marker, and negative cases to confirm the business path remains available, server-side evidence disappears, and no new parsing difference is introduced.

analysis.zh: 反射型 XSS 输出边界只有在唯一输入、最终解析或授权结果、服务端日志和可观察影响相互一致时才能确认。单一状态码、超时、错误文本、客户端显示或工具猜测只应作为线索，必须保留阴性对照和版本条件。
analysis.en: Reflected XSS Output Boundary is confirmed only when the unique input, final parsing or authorization result, server-side logs, and observable impact agree. A status code, timeout, error string, client display, or tool guess is only a lead; retain a negative control and exact version prerequisites.

opsecTips.zh: 一次只运行一个唯一标记，并限制请求次数、响应保存范围和实验持续时间。
opsecTips.en: Run one unique marker at a time and limit request count, retained response data, and experiment duration.

opsecTips.zh: 出现真实凭据、非实验数据、不可逆写入或非授权连接时立即停止并清理夹具。
opsecTips.en: Stop immediately and clean up the fixture on real credentials, non-lab data, irreversible writes, or unauthorized connections.

review.rationale: 验证请求参数是否未经上下文编码进入当前响应的可执行 HTML、属性或脚本位置。 保留原有合法攻击样例与变体，仅替换已证实的失效占位、协议错误或事实混淆，并补齐授权实验边界、检测证据、双语教程和权威引用。

prerequisites.zh: 准备正常输入、唯一标记、服务端日志和阴性对照；禁止扩展到非实验资产、真实凭据或不可回滚状态。
prerequisites.en: Prepare normal input, a unique marker, server logs, and a negative control; do not expand to non-lab assets, real credentials, or irreversible state.

overview.zh: CSP 回归与脚本来源审计聚焦以下边界：核对 CSP 是否限制脚本来源、内联执行、动态求值、base-uri 与对象加载，并区分策略缺口和 XSS 根因。 审校保留原有可用攻击语法与技术变体，同时补充适用版本、授权实验范围、正常基线、检测证据和停止条件；只有已确认错误的样例才被替换。
overview.en: CSP Regression and Script-Source Audit focuses on this boundary: Reviews whether CSP constrains script sources, inline execution, dynamic evaluation, base-uri, and object loading while separating policy gaps from the underlying XSS flaw. The review retains usable attack syntax and technical variants while adding version prerequisites, authorized-lab scope, normal baselines, detection evidence, and stop conditions; only confirmed incorrect samples are replaced.

vulnerability.zh: 风险来自不可信输入在输出时进入与其编码方式不匹配的浏览器上下文，或在 DOM 中流入可执行汇。黑名单、CSP、WAF 和字符串替换都不能替代按 HTML、属性、URL、CSS 或 JavaScript 上下文执行编码与净化。
vulnerability.en: Risk arises when untrusted input reaches a browser context whose output encoding does not match that context, or flows into an executable DOM sink. Blacklists, CSP, WAFs, and string replacement do not replace HTML, attribute, URL, CSS, or JavaScript contextual encoding and sanitization.

exploitation.zh: 在隔离页面中先渲染普通文本基线，再提交只设置 window 本地布尔标记的样例。阳性必须由最终 DOM、实际事件执行和浏览器控制台共同确认，并排除字符串回显、查看源代码、CSP 报告模式和浏览器扩展影响。
exploitation.en: Render a plain-text baseline in an isolated page, then submit a sample that only sets a local Boolean marker on window. Confirm a positive result with the final DOM, actual event execution, and browser console, excluding string reflection, view-source output, report-only CSP, and browser-extension effects.

mitigation.zh: 按最终输出上下文使用框架编码器，对允许富文本使用维护中的 HTML sanitizer，禁止不可信值进入危险 DOM 汇，并将 CSP 作为纵深防护。Cookie 使用 HttpOnly、Secure 与合适 SameSite，修复后重放文本、标记和阴性编码对照。
mitigation.en: Use framework encoders for the final output context, a maintained HTML sanitizer for permitted rich text, and prevent untrusted values from reaching dangerous DOM sinks, with CSP as defense in depth. Set HttpOnly, Secure, and appropriate SameSite on cookies, then replay text, marker, and negative encoding controls.

title.zh: 确认 CSP 回归与脚本来源审计 的适用入口
title.en: Confirm the Applicable CSP Regression and Script-Source Audit Entry Point

description.zh: 记录 CSP 回归与脚本来源审计 的组件版本、输入位置、执行主体、正常请求与服务端日志，确认当前夹具满足该技术的真实前置条件。
description.en: Record the component version, input location, execution principal, normal request, and server logs for CSP Regression and Script-Source Audit, confirming that the fixture satisfies its actual prerequisites.

title.zh: 运行 CSP 回归与脚本来源审计 单一授权样例
title.en: Run One Authorized CSP Regression and Script-Source Audit Sample

description.zh: 一次只运行第一条授权实验样例，并保存原始请求、响应、最终解析结果和对应日志；确认基线后再逐个验证其余变体。
description.en: Run only the first authorized-lab sample at a time and preserve the raw request, response, final parsed result, and matching logs; validate remaining variants one by one only after establishing the baseline.

title.zh: 关联 CSP 回归与脚本来源审计 的服务端证据
title.en: Correlate Server-Side Evidence for CSP Regression and Script-Source Audit

description.zh: 把唯一标记与解析器、代理、应用、数据库或浏览器证据按时间关联，并排除回显、缓存、重试、客户端修改和统一错误页。
description.en: Correlate the unique marker over time with parser, proxy, application, database, or browser evidence while excluding reflection, caching, retries, client modification, and generic error pages.

title.zh: 修复 CSP 回归与脚本来源审计 并重放基线
title.en: Remediate CSP Regression and Script-Source Audit and Replay the Baseline

description.zh: 应用最小边界修复后重放正常、标记和阴性样例，确认业务路径仍可用、服务端证据消失且没有引入新的解析差异。
description.en: Apply the smallest boundary fix and replay normal, marker, and negative cases to confirm the business path remains available, server-side evidence disappears, and no new parsing difference is introduced.

analysis.zh: CSP 回归与脚本来源审计只有在唯一输入、最终解析或授权结果、服务端日志和可观察影响相互一致时才能确认。单一状态码、超时、错误文本、客户端显示或工具猜测只应作为线索，必须保留阴性对照和版本条件。
analysis.en: CSP Regression and Script-Source Audit is confirmed only when the unique input, final parsing or authorization result, server-side logs, and observable impact agree. A status code, timeout, error string, client display, or tool guess is only a lead; retain a negative control and exact version prerequisites.

opsecTips.zh: 一次只运行一个唯一标记，并限制请求次数、响应保存范围和实验持续时间。
opsecTips.en: Run one unique marker at a time and limit request count, retained response data, and experiment duration.

opsecTips.zh: 出现真实凭据、非实验数据、不可逆写入或非授权连接时立即停止并清理夹具。
opsecTips.en: Stop immediately and clean up the fixture on real credentials, non-lab data, irreversible writes, or unauthorized connections.

review.rationale: 核对 CSP 是否限制脚本来源、内联执行、动态求值、base-uri 与对象加载，并区分策略缺口和 XSS 根因。 保留原有合法攻击样例与变体，仅替换已证实的失效占位、协议错误或事实混淆，并补齐授权实验边界、检测证据、双语教程和权威引用。

name.zh: 浏览器解析突变 XSS

description.zh: 浏览器解析突变 XSS保留可复现的攻击样例与绕过变体，仅修正已确认失效、占位或事实混淆的内容。所有样例只用于可回滚的授权实验，并要求浏览器、解析器、代理或服务端日志与可见结果一致。
description.en: Browser Parsing Mutation XSS preserves reproducible attack samples and bypass variants while correcting only confirmed obsolete, placeholder, or factually conflated content. Every sample is restricted to a reversible authorized lab and requires browser, parser, proxy, or server logs to agree with the visible result.

subCategory.zh: 浏览器解析突变 XSS

prerequisites.zh: 确认 浏览器解析突变 XSS 的目标、账号、数据、组件版本和停止条件均属于可回滚的授权实验范围。
prerequisites.en: Confirm that the target, accounts, data, component version, and stop conditions for Browser Parsing Mutation XSS are inside a reversible authorized lab scope.

The review retains usable attack syntax and technical variants while adding version prerequisites, authorized-lab scope, normal baselines, detection evidence, and stop conditions; only confirmed incorrect samples are replaced.

Every sample is restricted to a reversible authorized lab and requires browser, parser, proxy, or server logs to agree with the visible result.

overview.zh: Unicode 与字符编码 XSS 边界聚焦以下边界：分别验证 JavaScript 转义、HTML 字符引用、全角字符、UTF-7 文本和非法 UTF-8 的实际解析上下文。 审校保留原有可用攻击语法与技术变体，同时补充适用版本、授权实验范围、正常基线、检测证据和停止条件；只有已确认错误的样例才被替换。
overview.en: Unicode and Character-Encoding XSS Boundary focuses on this boundary: Separately validates JavaScript escapes, HTML character references, full-width characters, UTF-7 text, and invalid UTF-8 in their actual parsing contexts. The review retains usable attack syntax and technical variants while adding version prerequisites, authorized-lab scope, normal baselines, detection evidence, and stop conditions; only confirmed incorrect samples are replaced.

Every sample is restricted to a reversible authorized lab and requires browser, parser, proxy, or server logs to agree with the visible result.

subCategory.zh: XSS 过滤与规范化差异

overview.zh: XSS 过滤与规范化差异聚焦以下边界：验证黑名单、大小写处理、标记修复和空白规范化是否在编码之前留下可执行差异。 审校保留原有可用攻击语法与技术变体，同时补充适用版本、授权实验范围、正常基线、检测证据和停止条件；只有已确认错误的样例才被替换。
overview.en: XSS Filtering and Canonicalization Differences focuses on this boundary: Tests whether blacklists, case handling, markup repair, or whitespace normalization leaves an executable difference before output encoding. The review retains usable attack syntax and technical variants while adding version prerequisites, authorized-lab scope, normal baselines, detection evidence, and stop conditions; only confirmed incorrect samples are replaced.

vulnerability.zh: 风险来自不可信输入在输出时进入与其编码方式不匹配的浏览器上下文，或在 DOM 中流入可执行汇。黑名单、CSP、WAF 和字符串替换都不能替代按 HTML、属性、URL、CSS 或 JavaScript 上下文执行编码与净化。
vulnerability.en: Risk arises when untrusted input reaches a browser context whose output encoding does not match that context, or flows into an executable DOM sink. Blacklists, CSP, WAFs, and string replacement do not replace HTML, attribute, URL, CSS, or JavaScript contextual encoding and sanitization.

exploitation.zh: 在隔离页面中先渲染普通文本基线，再提交只设置 window 本地布尔标记的样例。阳性必须由最终 DOM、实际事件执行和浏览器控制台共同确认，并排除字符串回显、查看源代码、CSP 报告模式和浏览器扩展影响。
exploitation.en: Render a plain-text baseline in an isolated page, then submit a sample that only sets a local Boolean marker on window. Confirm a positive result with the final DOM, actual event execution, and browser console, excluding string reflection, view-source output, report-only CSP, and browser-extension effects.

mitigation.zh: 按最终输出上下文使用框架编码器，对允许富文本使用维护中的 HTML sanitizer，禁止不可信值进入危险 DOM 汇，并将 CSP 作为纵深防护。Cookie 使用 HttpOnly、Secure 与合适 SameSite，修复后重放文本、标记和阴性编码对照。
mitigation.en: Use framework encoders for the final output context, a maintained HTML sanitizer for permitted rich text, and prevent untrusted values from reaching dangerous DOM sinks, with CSP as defense in depth. Set HttpOnly, Secure, and appropriate SameSite on cookies, then replay text, marker, and negative encoding controls.

title.zh: 确认 XSS 过滤与规范化差异 的适用入口
title.en: Confirm the Applicable XSS Filtering and Canonicalization Differences Entry Point

description.zh: 记录 XSS 过滤与规范化差异 的组件版本、输入位置、执行主体、正常请求与服务端日志，确认当前夹具满足该技术的真实前置条件。
description.en: Record the component version, input location, execution principal, normal request, and server logs for XSS Filtering and Canonicalization Differences, confirming that the fixture satisfies its actual prerequisites.

title.zh: 运行 XSS 过滤与规范化差异 单一授权样例
title.en: Run One Authorized XSS Filtering and Canonicalization Differences Sample

description.zh: 一次只运行第一条授权实验样例，并保存原始请求、响应、最终解析结果和对应日志；确认基线后再逐个验证其余变体。
description.en: Run only the first authorized-lab sample at a time and preserve the raw request, response, final parsed result, and matching logs; validate remaining variants one by one only after establishing the baseline.

title.zh: 关联 XSS 过滤与规范化差异 的服务端证据
title.en: Correlate Server-Side Evidence for XSS Filtering and Canonicalization Differences

description.zh: 把唯一标记与解析器、代理、应用、数据库或浏览器证据按时间关联，并排除回显、缓存、重试、客户端修改和统一错误页。
description.en: Correlate the unique marker over time with parser, proxy, application, database, or browser evidence while excluding reflection, caching, retries, client modification, and generic error pages.

title.zh: 修复 XSS 过滤与规范化差异 并重放基线
title.en: Remediate XSS Filtering and Canonicalization Differences and Replay the Baseline

description.zh: 应用最小边界修复后重放正常、标记和阴性样例，确认业务路径仍可用、服务端证据消失且没有引入新的解析差异。
description.en: Apply the smallest boundary fix and replay normal, marker, and negative cases to confirm the business path remains available, server-side evidence disappears, and no new parsing difference is introduced.

analysis.zh: XSS 过滤与规范化差异只有在唯一输入、最终解析或授权结果、服务端日志和可观察影响相互一致时才能确认。单一状态码、超时、错误文本、客户端显示或工具猜测只应作为线索，必须保留阴性对照和版本条件。
analysis.en: XSS Filtering and Canonicalization Differences is confirmed only when the unique input, final parsing or authorization result, server-side logs, and observable impact agree. A status code, timeout, error string, client display, or tool guess is only a lead; retain a negative control and exact version prerequisites.

opsecTips.zh: 一次只运行一个唯一标记，并限制请求次数、响应保存范围和实验持续时间。
opsecTips.en: Run one unique marker at a time and limit request count, retained response data, and experiment duration.

opsecTips.zh: 出现真实凭据、非实验数据、不可逆写入或非授权连接时立即停止并清理夹具。
opsecTips.en: Stop immediately and clean up the fixture on real credentials, non-lab data, irreversible writes, or unauthorized connections.

review.rationale: 验证黑名单、大小写处理、标记修复和空白规范化是否在编码之前留下可执行差异。 保留原有合法攻击样例与变体，仅替换已证实的失效占位、协议错误或事实混淆，并补齐授权实验边界、检测证据、双语教程和权威引用。

name.zh: XSS 多层解码边界

description.zh: XSS 多层解码边界保留可复现的攻击样例与绕过变体，仅修正已确认失效、占位或事实混淆的内容。所有样例只用于可回滚的授权实验，并要求浏览器、解析器、代理或服务端日志与可见结果一致。
description.en: XSS Multi-Stage Decoding Boundary preserves reproducible attack samples and bypass variants while correcting only confirmed obsolete, placeholder, or factually conflated content. Every sample is restricted to a reversible authorized lab and requires browser, parser, proxy, or server logs to agree with the visible result.

subCategory.zh: XSS 多层解码边界

prerequisites.zh: 确认 XSS 多层解码边界 的目标、账号、数据、组件版本和停止条件均属于可回滚的授权实验范围。
prerequisites.en: Confirm that the target, accounts, data, component version, and stop conditions for XSS Multi-Stage Decoding Boundary are inside a reversible authorized lab scope.

prerequisites.zh: 准备正常输入、唯一标记、服务端日志和阴性对照；禁止扩展到非实验资产、真实凭据或不可回滚状态。
prerequisites.en: Prepare normal input, a unique marker, server logs, and a negative control; do not expand to non-lab assets, real credentials, or irreversible state.

overview.zh: XSS 多层解码边界聚焦以下边界：记录 URL、HTML 和 JavaScript 解码顺序，确认双重解码或错误上下文编码是否恢复可执行字符。 审校保留原有可用攻击语法与技术变体，同时补充适用版本、授权实验范围、正常基线、检测证据和停止条件；只有已确认错误的样例才被替换。

The review retains usable attack syntax and technical variants while adding version prerequisites, authorized-lab scope, normal baselines, detection evidence, and stop conditions; only confirmed incorrect samples are replaced.

overview.en: XSS Session-Cookie Exposure Validation focuses on this boundary: Validates HttpOnly, SameSite, and scope for a test cookie and proves script execution with a local marker without sending cookies to an external endpoint. The review retains usable attack syntax and technical variants while adding version prerequisites, authorized-lab scope, normal baselines, detection evidence, and stop conditions; only confirmed incorrect samples are replaced.

vulnerability.zh: 风险来自不可信输入在输出时进入与其编码方式不匹配的浏览器上下文，或在 DOM 中流入可执行汇。黑名单、CSP、WAF 和字符串替换都不能替代按 HTML、属性、URL、CSS 或 JavaScript 上下文执行编码与净化。
vulnerability.en: Risk arises when untrusted input reaches a browser context whose output encoding does not match that context, or flows into an executable DOM sink. Blacklists, CSP, WAFs, and string replacement do not replace HTML, attribute, URL, CSS, or JavaScript contextual encoding and sanitization.

exploitation.zh: 在隔离页面中先渲染普通文本基线，再提交只设置 window 本地布尔标记的样例。阳性必须由最终 DOM、实际事件执行和浏览器控制台共同确认，并排除字符串回显、查看源代码、CSP 报告模式和浏览器扩展影响。
exploitation.en: Render a plain-text baseline in an isolated page, then submit a sample that only sets a local Boolean marker on window. Confirm a positive result with the final DOM, actual event execution, and browser console, excluding string reflection, view-source output, report-only CSP, and browser-extension effects.

mitigation.zh: 按最终输出上下文使用框架编码器，对允许富文本使用维护中的 HTML sanitizer，禁止不可信值进入危险 DOM 汇，并将 CSP 作为纵深防护。Cookie 使用 HttpOnly、Secure 与合适 SameSite，修复后重放文本、标记和阴性编码对照。
mitigation.en: Use framework encoders for the final output context, a maintained HTML sanitizer for permitted rich text, and prevent untrusted values from reaching dangerous DOM sinks, with CSP as defense in depth. Set HttpOnly, Secure, and appropriate SameSite on cookies, then replay text, marker, and negative encoding controls.

title.zh: 确认 XSS 会话 Cookie 暴露验证 的适用入口
title.en: Confirm the Applicable XSS Session-Cookie Exposure Validation Entry Point

description.zh: 记录 XSS 会话 Cookie 暴露验证 的组件版本、输入位置、执行主体、正常请求与服务端日志，确认当前夹具满足该技术的真实前置条件。
description.en: Record the component version, input location, execution principal, normal request, and server logs for XSS Session-Cookie Exposure Validation, confirming that the fixture satisfies its actual prerequisites.

title.zh: 运行 XSS 会话 Cookie 暴露验证 单一授权样例
title.en: Run One Authorized XSS Session-Cookie Exposure Validation Sample

description.zh: 一次只运行第一条授权实验样例，并保存原始请求、响应、最终解析结果和对应日志；确认基线后再逐个验证其余变体。
description.en: Run only the first authorized-lab sample at a time and preserve the raw request, response, final parsed result, and matching logs; validate remaining variants one by one only after establishing the baseline.

title.zh: 关联 XSS 会话 Cookie 暴露验证 的服务端证据
title.en: Correlate Server-Side Evidence for XSS Session-Cookie Exposure Validation

description.zh: 把唯一标记与解析器、代理、应用、数据库或浏览器证据按时间关联，并排除回显、缓存、重试、客户端修改和统一错误页。
description.en: Correlate the unique marker over time with parser, proxy, application, database, or browser evidence while excluding reflection, caching, retries, client modification, and generic error pages.

title.zh: 修复 XSS 会话 Cookie 暴露验证 并重放基线
title.en: Remediate XSS Session-Cookie Exposure Validation and Replay the Baseline

description.zh: 应用最小边界修复后重放正常、标记和阴性样例，确认业务路径仍可用、服务端证据消失且没有引入新的解析差异。
description.en: Apply the smallest boundary fix and replay normal, marker, and negative cases to confirm the business path remains available, server-side evidence disappears, and no new parsing difference is introduced.

analysis.zh: XSS 会话 Cookie 暴露验证只有在唯一输入、最终解析或授权结果、服务端日志和可观察影响相互一致时才能确认。单一状态码、超时、错误文本、客户端显示或工具猜测只应作为线索，必须保留阴性对照和版本条件。
analysis.en: XSS Session-Cookie Exposure Validation is confirmed only when the unique input, final parsing or authorization result, server-side logs, and observable impact agree. A status code, timeout, error string, client display, or tool guess is only a lead; retain a negative control and exact version prerequisites.

opsecTips.zh: 一次只运行一个唯一标记，并限制请求次数、响应保存范围和实验持续时间。
opsecTips.en: Run one unique marker at a time and limit request count, retained response data, and experiment duration.

opsecTips.zh: 出现真实凭据、非实验数据、不可逆写入或非授权连接时立即停止并清理夹具。
opsecTips.en: Stop immediately and clean up the fixture on real credentials, non-lab data, irreversible writes, or unauthorized connections.

review.rationale: 验证测试 Cookie 的 HttpOnly、SameSite 与作用域，并以本地标记证明脚本执行，不向外部端点发送 Cookie。 保留原有合法攻击样例与变体，仅替换已证实的失效占位、协议错误或事实混淆，并补齐授权实验边界、检测证据、双语教程和权威引用。

name.zh: XSS 输入事件访问边界

description.zh: XSS 输入事件访问边界保留可复现的攻击样例与绕过变体，仅修正已确认失效、占位或事实混淆的内容。所有样例只用于可回滚的授权实验，并要求浏览器、解析器、代理或服务端日志与可见结果一致。
description.en: XSS Input-Event Access Boundary preserves reproducible attack samples and bypass variants while correcting only confirmed obsolete, placeholder, or factually conflated content. Every sample is restricted to a reversible authorized lab and requires browser, parser, proxy, or server logs to agree with the visible result.

subCategory.zh: XSS 输入事件访问边界

prerequisites.zh: 确认 XSS 输入事件访问边界 的目标、账号、数据、组件版本和停止条件均属于可回滚的授权实验范围。

prerequisites.zh: 准备正常输入、唯一标记、服务端日志和阴性对照；禁止扩展到非实验资产、真实凭据或不可回滚状态。
prerequisites.en: Prepare normal input, a unique marker, server logs, and a negative control; do not expand to non-lab assets, real credentials, or irreversible state.

overview.zh: XSS 输入事件访问边界聚焦以下边界：仅用合成键盘事件确认注入脚本能否注册页面事件，不收集、缓存或传输真实用户输入。 审校保留原有可用攻击语法与技术变体，同时补充适用版本、授权实验范围、正常基线、检测证据和停止条件；只有已确认错误的样例才被替换。
overview.en: XSS Input-Event Access Boundary focuses on this boundary: Uses only a synthetic keyboard event to determine whether injected script can register page events without collecting, buffering, or transmitting real user input. The review retains usable attack syntax and technical variants while adding version prerequisites, authorized-lab scope, normal baselines, detection evidence, and stop conditions; only confirmed incorrect samples are replaced.

Blacklists, CSP, WAFs, and string replacement do not replace HTML, attribute, URL, CSS, or JavaScript contextual encoding and sanitization.

Set HttpOnly, Secure, and appropriate SameSite on cookies, then replay text, marker, and negative encoding controls.

name.zh: SSRF 最终连接目标验证

description.zh: SSRF 最终连接目标验证保留可复现的攻击样例与绕过变体，仅修正已确认失效、占位或事实混淆的内容。所有样例只用于可回滚的授权实验，并要求浏览器、解析器、代理或服务端日志与可见结果一致。
description.en: SSRF Final-Destination Validation preserves reproducible attack samples and bypass variants while correcting only confirmed obsolete, placeholder, or factually conflated content. Every sample is restricted to a reversible authorized lab and requires browser, parser, proxy, or server logs to agree with the visible result.

subCategory.zh: SSRF 最终连接目标验证

prerequisites.zh: 确认 SSRF 最终连接目标验证 的目标、账号、数据、组件版本和停止条件均属于可回滚的授权实验范围。
prerequisites.en: Confirm that the target, accounts, data, component version, and stop conditions for SSRF Final-Destination Validation are inside a reversible authorized lab scope.

prerequisites.zh: 准备正常输入、唯一标记、服务端日志和阴性对照；禁止扩展到非实验资产、真实凭据或不可回滚状态。
prerequisites.en: Prepare normal input, a unique marker, server logs, and a negative control; do not expand to non-lab assets, real credentials, or irreversible state.

overview.zh: SSRF 最终连接目标验证聚焦以下边界：确认服务端取回器是否允许用户输入改变解析地址、最终连接 IP、端口或重定向目标。 审校保留原有可用攻击语法与技术变体，同时补充适用版本、授权实验范围、正常基线、检测证据和停止条件；只有已确认错误的样例才被替换。
overview.en: SSRF Final-Destination Validation focuses on this boundary: Determines whether user input can change a server-side fetcher resolved address, final connected IP, port, or redirect destination. The review retains usable attack syntax and technical variants while adding version prerequisites, authorized-lab scope, normal baselines, detection evidence, and stop conditions; only confirmed incorrect samples are replaced.

vulnerability.zh: 风险来自用户可控 URL、scheme、主机、端口、请求头或重定向跨越服务端出站信任边界。校验必须基于规范化后解析地址和最终连接目标，并在每次 DNS 解析与重定向后重新执行，不能只检查原始字符串。
vulnerability.en: Risk arises when user-controlled URLs, schemes, hosts, ports, headers, or redirects cross the server-side egress trust boundary. Validation must use canonicalized resolved addresses and the final connected destination and must repeat after every DNS resolution and redirect rather than checking only the original string.

exploitation.zh: 先请求自有 HTTPS 标记服务记录取回器身份、DNS、最终 IP、请求头、重定向和响应传播，再只对隔离内部夹具运行一个唯一标记。阳性需要夹具日志与应用出站日志同时出现相同标记；超时、状态码或 URL 被接受均不足。
exploitation.en: First request an owned HTTPS marker service to record fetcher identity, DNS, final IP, headers, redirects, and response propagation, then run one unique marker only against an isolated internal fixture. A positive result requires the same marker in both fixture and application egress logs; a timeout, status code, or accepted URL is insufficient.

mitigation.zh: 只允许业务必需的 http/https 目标与端口，规范化并解析后阻止回环、链路本地、私网和保留地址，固定连接 IP 与正确 Host/SNI，并在重定向后复检。禁止用户控制敏感请求头，通过网络策略限制元数据、数据库和管理网段。
mitigation.en: Allow only business-required http and https destinations and ports; canonicalize and resolve before blocking loopback, link-local, private, and reserved addresses; pin the connected IP with correct Host and SNI; and revalidate redirects. Prevent user control of sensitive headers and restrict metadata, database, and management networks with egress policy.

title.zh: 确认 SSRF 最终连接目标验证 的适用入口
title.en: Confirm the Applicable SSRF Final-Destination Validation Entry Point

description.zh: 记录 SSRF 最终连接目标验证 的组件版本、输入位置、执行主体、正常请求与服务端日志，确认当前夹具满足该技术的真实前置条件。

description.en: Correlate the unique marker over time with parser, proxy, application, database, or browser evidence while excluding reflection, caching, retries, client modification, and generic error pages.

opsecTips.en: Run one unique marker at a time and limit request count, retained response data, and experiment duration.

opsecTips.en: Stop immediately and clean up the fixture on real credentials, non-lab data, irreversible writes, or unauthorized connections.

name.zh: AWS IMDSv2 SSRF 验证

overview.en: AWS IMDSv2 SSRF Validation focuses on this boundary: Tests on an owned EC2 lab instance whether a fetcher can perform the IMDSv2 token flow while reading only lower-sensitivity instance fields. The review retains usable attack syntax and technical variants while adding version prerequisites, authorized-lab scope, normal baselines, detection evidence, and stop conditions; only confirmed incorrect samples are replaced.

exploitation.en: First request an owned HTTPS marker service to record fetcher identity, DNS, final IP, headers, redirects, and response propagation, then run one unique marker only against an isolated internal fixture. A positive result requires the same marker in both fixture and application egress logs; a timeout, status code, or accepted URL is insufficient.

mitigation.zh: 只允许业务必需的 http/https 目标与端口，规范化并解析后阻止回环、链路本地、私网和保留地址，固定连接 IP 与正确 Host/SNI，并在重定向后复检。禁止用户控制敏感请求头，通过网络策略限制元数据、数据库和管理网段。
mitigation.en: Allow only business-required http and https destinations and ports; canonicalize and resolve before blocking loopback, link-local, private, and reserved addresses; pin the connected IP with correct Host and SNI; and revalidate redirects. Prevent user control of sensitive headers and restrict metadata, database, and management networks with egress policy.

title.zh: 确认 AWS IMDSv2 SSRF 验证 的适用入口
title.en: Confirm the Applicable AWS IMDSv2 SSRF Validation Entry Point

description.zh: 记录 AWS IMDSv2 SSRF 验证 的组件版本、输入位置、执行主体、正常请求与服务端日志，确认当前夹具满足该技术的真实前置条件。
description.en: Record the component version, input location, execution principal, normal request, and server logs for AWS IMDSv2 SSRF Validation, confirming that the fixture satisfies its actual prerequisites.

title.zh: 运行 AWS IMDSv2 SSRF 验证 单一授权样例
title.en: Run One Authorized AWS IMDSv2 SSRF Validation Sample

description.zh: 一次只运行第一条授权实验样例，并保存原始请求、响应、最终解析结果和对应日志；确认基线后再逐个验证其余变体。
description.en: Run only the first authorized-lab sample at a time and preserve the raw request, response, final parsed result, and matching logs; validate remaining variants one by one only after establishing the baseline.

title.zh: 关联 AWS IMDSv2 SSRF 验证 的服务端证据
title.en: Correlate Server-Side Evidence for AWS IMDSv2 SSRF Validation

description.zh: 把唯一标记与解析器、代理、应用、数据库或浏览器证据按时间关联，并排除回显、缓存、重试、客户端修改和统一错误页。
description.en: Correlate the unique marker over time with parser, proxy, application, database, or browser evidence while excluding reflection, caching, retries, client modification, and generic error pages.

title.zh: 修复 AWS IMDSv2 SSRF 验证 并重放基线
title.en: Remediate AWS IMDSv2 SSRF Validation and Replay the Baseline

description.zh: 应用最小边界修复后重放正常、标记和阴性样例，确认业务路径仍可用、服务端证据消失且没有引入新的解析差异。
description.en: Apply the smallest boundary fix and replay normal, marker, and negative cases to confirm the business path remains available, server-side evidence disappears, and no new parsing difference is introduced.

analysis.zh: AWS IMDSv2 SSRF 验证只有在唯一输入、最终解析或授权结果、服务端日志和可观察影响相互一致时才能确认。单一状态码、超时、错误文本、客户端显示或工具猜测只应作为线索，必须保留阴性对照和版本条件。
analysis.en: AWS IMDSv2 SSRF Validation is confirmed only when the unique input, final parsing or authorization result, server-side logs, and observable impact agree. A status code, timeout, error string, client display, or tool guess is only a lead; retain a negative control and exact version prerequisites.

opsecTips.zh: 一次只运行一个唯一标记，并限制请求次数、响应保存范围和实验持续时间。
opsecTips.en: Run one unique marker at a time and limit request count, retained response data, and experiment duration.

opsecTips.zh: 出现真实凭据、非实验数据、不可逆写入或非授权连接时立即停止并清理夹具。
opsecTips.en: Stop immediately and clean up the fixture on real credentials, non-lab data, irreversible writes, or unauthorized connections.

review.rationale: 在自有 EC2 实验实例中验证取回器是否能执行 IMDSv2 令牌流程，并只读取低敏感度实例字段。 保留原有合法攻击样例与变体，仅替换已证实的失效占位、协议错误或事实混淆，并补齐授权实验边界、检测证据、双语教程和权威引用。

name.zh: SSRF 非 HTTP Scheme 边界

description.zh: SSRF 非 HTTP Scheme 边界保留可复现的攻击样例与绕过变体，仅修正已确认失效、占位或事实混淆的内容。所有样例只用于可回滚的授权实验，并要求浏览器、解析器、代理或服务端日志与可见结果一致。
description.en: SSRF Non-HTTP Scheme Boundary preserves reproducible attack samples and bypass variants while correcting only confirmed obsolete, placeholder, or factually conflated content. Every sample is restricted to a reversible authorized lab and requires browser, parser, proxy, or server logs to agree with the visible result.

subCategory.zh: SSRF 非 HTTP Scheme 边界

prerequisites.zh: 确认 SSRF 非 HTTP Scheme 边界 的目标、账号、数据、组件版本和停止条件均属于可回滚的授权实验范围。
prerequisites.en: Confirm that the target, accounts, data, component version, and stop conditions for SSRF Non-HTTP Scheme Boundary are inside a reversible authorized lab scope.

prerequisites.zh: 准备正常输入、唯一标记、服务端日志和阴性对照；禁止扩展到非实验资产、真实凭据或不可回滚状态。
prerequisites.en: Prepare normal input, a unique marker, server logs, and a negative control; do not expand to non-lab assets, real credentials, or irreversible state.

overview.zh: SSRF 非 HTTP Scheme 边界聚焦以下边界：验证取回器是否错误允许 file、dict、gopher 或 LDAP 等非业务协议连接受控夹具。 审校保留原有可用攻击语法与技术变体，同时补充适用版本、授权实验范围、正常基线、检测证据和停止条件；只有已确认错误的样例才被替换。
overview.en: SSRF Non-HTTP Scheme Boundary focuses on this boundary: Tests whether a fetcher improperly permits non-business schemes such as file, dict, gopher, or LDAP against controlled fixtures. The review retains usable attack syntax and technical variants while adding version prerequisites, authorized-lab scope, normal baselines, detection evidence, and stop conditions; only confirmed incorrect samples are replaced.

vulnerability.zh: 风险来自用户可控 URL、scheme、主机、端口、请求头或重定向跨越服务端出站信任边界。校验必须基于规范化后解析地址和最终连接目标，并在每次 DNS 解析与重定向后重新执行，不能只检查原始字符串。
vulnerability.en: Risk arises when user-controlled URLs, schemes, hosts, ports, headers, or redirects cross the server-side egress trust boundary. Validation must use canonicalized resolved addresses and the final connected destination and must repeat after every DNS resolution and redirect rather than checking only the original string.

exploitation.zh: 先请求自有 HTTPS 标记服务记录取回器身份、DNS、最终 IP、请求头、重定向和响应传播，再只对隔离内部夹具运行一个唯一标记。阳性需要夹具日志与应用出站日志同时出现相同标记；超时、状态码或 URL 被接受均不足。
exploitation.en: First request an owned HTTPS marker service to record fetcher identity, DNS, final IP, headers, redirects, and response propagation, then run one unique marker only against an isolated internal fixture. A positive result requires the same marker in both fixture and application egress logs; a timeout, status code, or accepted URL is insufficient.

mitigation.zh: 只允许业务必需的 http/https 目标与端口，规范化并解析后阻止回环、链路本地、私网和保留地址，固定连接 IP 与正确 Host/SNI，并在重定向后复检。禁止用户控制敏感请求头，通过网络策略限制元数据、数据库和管理网段。
mitigation.en: Allow only business-required http and https destinations and ports; canonicalize and resolve before blocking loopback, link-local, private, and reserved addresses; pin the connected IP with correct Host and SNI; and revalidate redirects. Prevent user control of sensitive headers and restrict metadata, database, and management networks with egress policy.

title.en: Confirm the Applicable SSRF Dict Port-Boundary Validation Entry Point

description.zh: 记录 SSRF Dict 端口边界验证 的组件版本、输入位置、执行主体、正常请求与服务端日志，确认当前夹具满足该技术的真实前置条件。
description.en: Record the component version, input location, execution principal, normal request, and server logs for SSRF Dict Port-Boundary Validation, confirming that the fixture satisfies its actual prerequisites.

title.zh: 运行 SSRF Dict 端口边界验证 单一授权样例
title.en: Run One Authorized SSRF Dict Port-Boundary Validation Sample

description.zh: 一次只运行第一条授权实验样例，并保存原始请求、响应、最终解析结果和对应日志；确认基线后再逐个验证其余变体。
description.en: Run only the first authorized-lab sample at a time and preserve the raw request, response, final parsed result, and matching logs; validate remaining variants one by one only after establishing the baseline.

title.zh: 关联 SSRF Dict 端口边界验证 的服务端证据
title.en: Correlate Server-Side Evidence for SSRF Dict Port-Boundary Validation

description.zh: 把唯一标记与解析器、代理、应用、数据库或浏览器证据按时间关联，并排除回显、缓存、重试、客户端修改和统一错误页。
description.en: Correlate the unique marker over time with parser, proxy, application, database, or browser evidence while excluding reflection, caching, retries, client modification, and generic error pages.

title.zh: 修复 SSRF Dict 端口边界验证 并重放基线
title.en: Remediate SSRF Dict Port-Boundary Validation and Replay the Baseline

description.zh: 应用最小边界修复后重放正常、标记和阴性样例，确认业务路径仍可用、服务端证据消失且没有引入新的解析差异。
description.en: Apply the smallest boundary fix and replay normal, marker, and negative cases to confirm the business path remains available, server-side evidence disappears, and no new parsing difference is introduced.

analysis.zh: SSRF Dict 端口边界验证只有在唯一输入、最终解析或授权结果、服务端日志和可观察影响相互一致时才能确认。单一状态码、超时、错误文本、客户端显示或工具猜测只应作为线索，必须保留阴性对照和版本条件。
analysis.en: SSRF Dict Port-Boundary Validation is confirmed only when the unique input, final parsing or authorization result, server-side logs, and observable impact agree. A status code, timeout, error string, client display, or tool guess is only a lead; retain a negative control and exact version prerequisites.

opsecTips.zh: 一次只运行一个唯一标记，并限制请求次数、响应保存范围和实验持续时间。
opsecTips.en: Run one unique marker at a time and limit request count, retained response data, and experiment duration.

opsecTips.zh: 出现真实凭据、非实验数据、不可逆写入或非授权连接时立即停止并清理夹具。
opsecTips.en: Stop immediately and clean up the fixture on real credentials, non-lab data, irreversible writes, or unauthorized connections.

review.rationale: 使用隔离监听器确认 dict scheme 和目标端口是否可达，不把服务横幅或错误解释为命令执行。 保留原有合法攻击样例与变体，仅替换已证实的失效占位、协议错误或事实混淆，并补齐授权实验边界、检测证据、双语教程和权威引用。

name.zh: SSRF File Scheme 沙箱读取

description.zh: SSRF File Scheme 沙箱读取保留可复现的攻击样例与绕过变体，仅修正已确认失效、占位或事实混淆的内容。所有样例只用于可回滚的授权实验，并要求浏览器、解析器、代理或服务端日志与可见结果一致。
description.en: SSRF File-Scheme Sandbox Read preserves reproducible attack samples and bypass variants while correcting only confirmed obsolete, placeholder, or factually conflated content. Every sample is restricted to a reversible authorized lab and requires browser, parser, proxy, or server logs to agree with the visible result.

subCategory.zh: SSRF File Scheme 沙箱读取

prerequisites.zh: 确认 SSRF File Scheme 沙箱读取 的目标、账号、数据、组件版本和停止条件均属于可回滚的授权实验范围。
prerequisites.en: Confirm that the target, accounts, data, component version, and stop conditions for SSRF File-Scheme Sandbox Read are inside a reversible authorized lab scope.

prerequisites.zh: 准备正常输入、唯一标记、服务端日志和阴性对照；禁止扩展到非实验资产、真实凭据或不可回滚状态。
prerequisites.en: Prepare normal input, a unique marker, server logs, and a negative control; do not expand to non-lab assets, real credentials, or irreversible state.

overview.zh: SSRF File Scheme 沙箱读取聚焦以下边界：只读取专用沙箱中的固定标记文件，验证 file scheme 是否越过应用允许的网络取回边界。 审校保留原有可用攻击语法与技术变体，同时补充适用版本、授权实验范围、正常基线、检测证据和停止条件；只有已确认错误的样例才被替换。
overview.en: SSRF File-Scheme Sandbox Read focuses on this boundary: Reads only a fixed marker file in a dedicated sandbox to test whether file scheme crosses the application network-fetch boundary. The review retains usable attack syntax and technical variants while adding version prerequisites, authorized-lab scope, normal baselines, detection evidence, and stop conditions; only confirmed incorrect samples are replaced.

vulnerability.zh: 风险来自用户可控 URL、scheme、主机、端口、请求头或重定向跨越服务端出站信任边界。校验必须基于规范化后解析地址和最终连接目标，并在每次 DNS 解析与重定向后重新执行，不能只检查原始字符串。
vulnerability.en: Risk arises when user-controlled URLs, schemes, hosts, ports, headers, or redirects cross the server-side egress trust boundary. Validation must use canonicalized resolved addresses and the final connected destination and must repeat after every DNS resolution and redirect rather than checking only the original string.

exploitation.zh: 先请求自有 HTTPS 标记服务记录取回器身份、DNS、最终 IP、请求头、重定向和响应传播，再只对隔离内部夹具运行一个唯一标记。阳性需要夹具日志与应用出站日志同时出现相同标记；超时、状态码或 URL 被接受均不足。
exploitation.en: First request an owned HTTPS marker service to record fetcher identity, DNS, final IP, headers, redirects, and response propagation, then run one unique marker only against an isolated internal fixture. A positive result requires the same marker in both fixture and application egress logs; a timeout, status code, or accepted URL is insufficient.

mitigation.zh: 只允许业务必需的 http/https 目标与端口，规范化并解析后阻止回环、链路本地、私网和保留地址，固定连接 IP 与正确 Host/SNI，并在重定向后复检。禁止用户控制敏感请求头，通过网络策略限制元数据、数据库和管理网段。
mitigation.en: Allow only business-required http and https destinations and ports; canonicalize and resolve before blocking loopback, link-local, private, and reserved addresses; pin the connected IP with correct Host and SNI; and revalidate redirects. Prevent user control of sensitive headers and restrict metadata, database, and management networks with egress policy.

title.zh: 确认 SSRF File Scheme 沙箱读取 的适用入口

opsecTips.en: Stop immediately and clean up the fixture on real credentials, non-lab data, irreversible writes, or unauthorized connections.

title.en: Correlate Server-Side Evidence for SSRF DNS Re-Resolution Pinning Validation

description.zh: 把唯一标记与解析器、代理、应用、数据库或浏览器证据按时间关联，并排除回显、缓存、重试、客户端修改和统一错误页。
description.en: Correlate the unique marker over time with parser, proxy, application, database, or browser evidence while excluding reflection, caching, retries, client modification, and generic error pages.

title.zh: 修复 SSRF DNS 重解析固定验证 并重放基线
title.en: Remediate SSRF DNS Re-Resolution Pinning Validation and Replay the Baseline

description.zh: 应用最小边界修复后重放正常、标记和阴性样例，确认业务路径仍可用、服务端证据消失且没有引入新的解析差异。
description.en: Apply the smallest boundary fix and replay normal, marker, and negative cases to confirm the business path remains available, server-side evidence disappears, and no new parsing difference is introduced.

analysis.zh: SSRF DNS 重解析固定验证只有在唯一输入、最终解析或授权结果、服务端日志和可观察影响相互一致时才能确认。单一状态码、超时、错误文本、客户端显示或工具猜测只应作为线索，必须保留阴性对照和版本条件。
analysis.en: SSRF DNS Re-Resolution Pinning Validation is confirmed only when the unique input, final parsing or authorization result, server-side logs, and observable impact agree. A status code, timeout, error string, client display, or tool guess is only a lead; retain a negative control and exact version prerequisites.

opsecTips.zh: 一次只运行一个唯一标记，并限制请求次数、响应保存范围和实验持续时间。
opsecTips.en: Run one unique marker at a time and limit request count, retained response data, and experiment duration.

opsecTips.zh: 出现真实凭据、非实验数据、不可逆写入或非授权连接时立即停止并清理夹具。
opsecTips.en: Stop immediately and clean up the fixture on real credentials, non-lab data, irreversible writes, or unauthorized connections.

review.rationale: 在双端均受控的重绑定夹具中比较校验和连接时的 DNS 答案，验证地址是否固定并重新分类。 保留原有合法攻击样例与变体，仅替换已证实的失效占位、协议错误或事实混淆，并补齐授权实验边界、检测证据、双语教程和权威引用。

name.zh: SSRF Redis PING 可达性验证

description.zh: SSRF Redis PING 可达性验证保留可复现的攻击样例与绕过变体，仅修正已确认失效、占位或事实混淆的内容。所有样例只用于可回滚的授权实验，并要求浏览器、解析器、代理或服务端日志与可见结果一致。
description.en: SSRF Redis PING Reachability Validation preserves reproducible attack samples and bypass variants while correcting only confirmed obsolete, placeholder, or factually conflated content. Every sample is restricted to a reversible authorized lab and requires browser, parser, proxy, or server logs to agree with the visible result.

subCategory.zh: SSRF Redis PING 可达性验证

prerequisites.zh: 确认 SSRF Redis PING 可达性验证 的目标、账号、数据、组件版本和停止条件均属于可回滚的授权实验范围。
prerequisites.en: Confirm that the target, accounts, data, component version, and stop conditions for SSRF Redis PING Reachability Validation are inside a reversible authorized lab scope.

prerequisites.zh: 准备正常输入、唯一标记、服务端日志和阴性对照；禁止扩展到非实验资产、真实凭据或不可回滚状态。
prerequisites.en: Prepare normal input, a unique marker, server logs, and a negative control; do not expand to non-lab assets, real credentials, or irreversible state.

overview.zh: SSRF Redis PING 可达性验证聚焦以下边界：仅向隔离 Redis 夹具发送 PING 帧，确认协议可达性，不写键、不改配置也不触发持久化。 审校保留原有可用攻击语法与技术变体，同时补充适用版本、授权实验范围、正常基线、检测证据和停止条件；只有已确认错误的样例才被替换。
overview.en: SSRF Redis PING Reachability Validation focuses on this boundary: Sends only a PING frame to an isolated Redis fixture to confirm protocol reachability without writing keys, changing configuration, or triggering persistence. The review retains usable attack syntax and technical variants while adding version prerequisites, authorized-lab scope, normal baselines, detection evidence, and stop conditions; only confirmed incorrect samples are replaced.

vulnerability.zh: 风险来自用户可控 URL、scheme、主机、端口、请求头或重定向跨越服务端出站信任边界。校验必须基于规范化后解析地址和最终连接目标，并在每次 DNS 解析与重定向后重新执行，不能只检查原始字符串。
vulnerability.en: Risk arises when user-controlled URLs, schemes, hosts, ports, headers, or redirects cross the server-side egress trust boundary. Validation must use canonicalized resolved addresses and the final connected destination and must repeat after every DNS resolution and redirect rather than checking only the original string.

exploitation.zh: 先请求自有 HTTPS 标记服务记录取回器身份、DNS、最终 IP、请求头、重定向和响应传播，再只对隔离内部夹具运行一个唯一标记。阳性需要夹具日志与应用出站日志同时出现相同标记；超时、状态码或 URL 被接受均不足。
exploitation.en: First request an owned HTTPS marker service to record fetcher identity, DNS, final IP, headers, redirects, and response propagation, then run one unique marker only against an isolated internal fixture. A positive result requires the same marker in both fixture and application egress logs; a timeout, status code, or accepted URL is insufficient.

mitigation.zh: 只允许业务必需的 http/https 目标与端口，规范化并解析后阻止回环、链路本地、私网和保留地址，固定连接 IP 与正确 Host/SNI，并在重定向后复检。禁止用户控制敏感请求头，通过网络策略限制元数据、数据库和管理网段。
mitigation.en: Allow only business-required http and https destinations and ports; canonicalize and resolve before blocking loopback, link-local, private, and reserved addresses; pin the connected IP with correct Host and SNI; and revalidate redirects. Prevent user control of sensitive headers and restrict metadata, database, and management networks with egress policy.

title.zh: 确认 SSRF Redis PING 可达性验证 的适用入口
title.en: Confirm the Applicable SSRF Redis PING Reachability Validation Entry Point

description.zh: 记录 SSRF Redis PING 可达性验证 的组件版本、输入位置、执行主体、正常请求与服务端日志，确认当前夹具满足该技术的真实前置条件。
description.en: Record the component version, input location, execution principal, normal request, and server logs for SSRF Redis PING Reachability Validation, confirming that the fixture satisfies its actual prerequisites.

title.zh: 运行 SSRF Redis PING 可达性验证 单一授权样例
title.en: Run One Authorized SSRF Redis PING Reachability Validation Sample

description.zh: 一次只运行第一条授权实验样例，并保存原始请求、响应、最终解析结果和对应日志；确认基线后再逐个验证其余变体。
description.en: Run only the first authorized-lab sample at a time and preserve the raw request, response, final parsed result, and matching logs; validate remaining variants one by one only after establishing the baseline.

title.zh: 关联 SSRF Redis PING 可达性验证 的服务端证据

description.zh: 把唯一标记与解析器、代理、应用、数据库或浏览器证据按时间关联，并排除回显、缓存、重试、客户端修改和统一错误页。

analysis.en: SSRF Redis PING Reachability Validation is confirmed only when the unique input, final parsing or authorization result, server-side logs, and observable impact agree. opsecTips.zh: 一次只运行一个唯一标记，并限制请求次数、响应保存范围和实验持续时间。
opsecTips.en: Run one unique marker at a time and limit request count, retained response data, and experiment duration.

opsecTips.zh: 出现真实凭据、非实验数据、不可逆写入或非授权连接时立即停止并清理夹具。
opsecTips.en: Stop immediately and clean up the fixture on real credentials, non-lab data, irreversible writes, or unauthorized connections.

review.rationale: 仅向隔离 Redis 夹具发送 PING 帧，确认协议可达性，不写键、不改配置也不触发持久化。 保留原有合法攻击样例与变体，仅替换已证实的失效占位、协议错误或事实混淆，并补齐授权实验边界、检测证据、双语教程和权威引用。

name.zh: 操作系统命令注入无害标记

description.zh: 操作系统命令注入无害标记保留可复现的攻击样例与绕过变体，仅修正已确认失效、占位或事实混淆的内容。所有样例只用于可回滚的授权实验，并要求浏览器、解析器、代理或服务端日志与可见结果一致。
description.en: OS Command Injection Harmless Marker preserves reproducible attack samples and bypass variants while correcting only confirmed obsolete, placeholder, or factually conflated content. Every sample is restricted to a reversible authorized lab and requires browser, parser, proxy, or server logs to agree with the visible result.

subCategory.zh: 操作系统命令注入无害标记

prerequisites.zh: 确认 操作系统命令注入无害标记 的目标、账号、数据、组件版本和停止条件均属于可回滚的授权实验范围。
prerequisites.en: Confirm that the target, accounts, data, component version, and stop conditions for OS Command Injection Harmless Marker are inside a reversible authorized lab scope.

prerequisites.zh: 准备正常输入、唯一标记、服务端日志和阴性对照；禁止扩展到非实验资产、真实凭据或不可回滚状态。
prerequisites.en: Prepare normal input, a unique marker, server logs, and a negative control; do not expand to non-lab assets, real credentials, or irreversible state.

overview.zh: 操作系统命令注入无害标记聚焦以下边界：使用 printf 固定标记证明参数到达命令解释器，不读取文件、不联网也不启动子任务。 审校保留原有可用攻击语法与技术变体，同时补充适用版本、授权实验范围、正常基线、检测证据和停止条件；只有已确认错误的样例才被替换。
overview.en: OS Command Injection Harmless Marker focuses on this boundary: Uses a fixed printf marker to prove that input reaches a command interpreter without reading files, using the network, or starting a secondary task. The review retains usable attack syntax and technical variants while adding version prerequisites, authorized-lab scope, normal baselines, detection evidence, and stop conditions; only confirmed incorrect samples are replaced.

vulnerability.zh: 风险来自不可信数据跨越字符串、模板、包含、反序列化或进程启动边界并被解释为代码、命令或运行时类型。确认必须区分输入回显、解析错误、可控计算、子进程创建和真正的权限影响。
vulnerability.en: Risk arises when untrusted data crosses a string, template, include, deserialization, or process-launch boundary and is interpreted as code, a command, or a runtime type. Confirmation must distinguish reflection, parser errors, controlled evaluation, child-process creation, and actual privilege impact.

exploitation.zh: 先用普通文本建立响应与日志基线，再执行只输出 PAYLOADER_RCE 固定标记或加载无副作用测试类型的样例。阳性必须由服务器端解释器、进程、类加载或模板日志与响应标记共同证明；不使用网络回连、敏感读取或持久化。
exploitation.en: Establish response and log baselines with plain text, then run a sample that only emits a fixed PAYLOADER_RCE marker or loads a side-effect-free test type. A positive result requires matching server-side interpreter, process, class-loading, or template logs plus the response marker, without callbacks, sensitive reads, or persistence.

mitigation.zh: 移除动态执行和 shell 拼接，使用固定 API、参数数组、允许模板 ID 与安全反序列化类型；上传和日志目录不可执行，运行账户采用最小权限与隔离。记录异常子进程、类型加载、包含路径和解析错误，并用同一标记回归。
mitigation.en: Remove dynamic evaluation and shell concatenation; use fixed APIs, argument arrays, allowed template IDs, and safe deserialization types. Keep upload and log storage non-executable and run with least privilege and isolation. Audit anomalous child processes, type loading, include paths, and parser errors, then regress with the same marker.

title.en: Confirm the Applicable OS Command Injection Harmless Marker Entry Point

title.zh: 修复 PHP 动态执行边界验证 并重放基线
title.en: Remediate PHP Dynamic-Execution Boundary Validation and Replay the Baseline

description.zh: 应用最小边界修复后重放正常、标记和阴性样例，确认业务路径仍可用、服务端证据消失且没有引入新的解析差异。
description.en: Apply the smallest boundary fix and replay normal, marker, and negative cases to confirm the business path remains available, server-side evidence disappears, and no new parsing difference is introduced.

analysis.zh: PHP 动态执行边界验证只有在唯一输入、最终解析或授权结果、服务端日志和可观察影响相互一致时才能确认。单一状态码、超时、错误文本、客户端显示或工具猜测只应作为线索，必须保留阴性对照和版本条件。
analysis.en: PHP Dynamic-Execution Boundary Validation is confirmed only when the unique input, final parsing or authorization result, server-side logs, and observable impact agree. A status code, timeout, error string, client display, or tool guess is only a lead; retain a negative control and exact version prerequisites.

opsecTips.zh: 一次只运行一个唯一标记，并限制请求次数、响应保存范围和实验持续时间。
opsecTips.en: Run one unique marker at a time and limit request count, retained response data, and experiment duration.

opsecTips.zh: 出现真实凭据、非实验数据、不可逆写入或非授权连接时立即停止并清理夹具。
opsecTips.en: Stop immediately and clean up the fixture on real credentials, non-lab data, irreversible writes, or unauthorized connections.

review.rationale: 在专用 PHP 夹具中只输出固定标记，区分字符串回显、模板插值和真正的服务端代码求值。 保留原有合法攻击样例与变体，仅替换已证实的失效占位、协议错误或事实混淆，并补齐授权实验边界、检测证据、双语教程和权威引用。

name.zh: PHP Filter 受控资源边界

description.zh: PHP Filter 受控资源边界保留可复现的攻击样例与绕过变体，仅修正已确认失效、占位或事实混淆的内容。所有样例只用于可回滚的授权实验，并要求浏览器、解析器、代理或服务端日志与可见结果一致。
description.en: PHP Filter Controlled-Resource Boundary preserves reproducible attack samples and bypass variants while correcting only confirmed obsolete, placeholder, or factually conflated content. Every sample is restricted to a reversible authorized lab and requires browser, parser, proxy, or server logs to agree with the visible result.

subCategory.zh: PHP Filter 受控资源边界

prerequisites.zh: 确认 PHP Filter 受控资源边界 的目标、账号、数据、组件版本和停止条件均属于可回滚的授权实验范围。
prerequisites.en: Confirm that the target, accounts, data, component version, and stop conditions for PHP Filter Controlled-Resource Boundary are inside a reversible authorized lab scope.

prerequisites.zh: 准备正常输入、唯一标记、服务端日志和阴性对照；禁止扩展到非实验资产、真实凭据或不可回滚状态。
prerequisites.en: Prepare normal input, a unique marker, server logs, and a negative control; do not expand to non-lab assets, real credentials, or irreversible state.

overview.zh: PHP Filter 受控资源边界聚焦以下边界：只对沙箱标记文件验证 php://filter 解析，禁止构造动态代码链或读取应用源码。 审校保留原有可用攻击语法与技术变体，同时补充适用版本、授权实验范围、正常基线、检测证据和停止条件；只有已确认错误的样例才被替换。
overview.en: PHP Filter Controlled-Resource Boundary focuses on this boundary: Validates php://filter only against a sandbox marker file and prohibits dynamic code chains or application-source reads. The review retains usable attack syntax and technical variants while adding version prerequisites, authorized-lab scope, normal baselines, detection evidence, and stop conditions; only confirmed incorrect samples are replaced.

vulnerability.zh: 风险来自不可信数据跨越字符串、模板、包含、反序列化或进程启动边界并被解释为代码、命令或运行时类型。确认必须区分输入回显、解析错误、可控计算、子进程创建和真正的权限影响。
vulnerability.en: Risk arises when untrusted data crosses a string, template, include, deserialization, or process-launch boundary and is interpreted as code, a command, or a runtime type. Confirmation must distinguish reflection, parser errors, controlled evaluation, child-process creation, and actual privilege impact.

exploitation.zh: 先用普通文本建立响应与日志基线，再执行只输出 PAYLOADER_RCE 固定标记或加载无副作用测试类型的样例。阳性必须由服务器端解释器、进程、类加载或模板日志与响应标记共同证明；不使用网络回连、敏感读取或持久化。
exploitation.en: Establish response and log baselines with plain text, then run a sample that only emits a fixed PAYLOADER_RCE marker or loads a side-effect-free test type. A positive result requires matching server-side interpreter, process, class-loading, or template logs plus the response marker, without callbacks, sensitive reads, or persistence.

mitigation.zh: 移除动态执行和 shell 拼接，使用固定 API、参数数组、允许模板 ID 与安全反序列化类型；上传和日志目录不可执行，运行账户采用最小权限与隔离。记录异常子进程、类型加载、包含路径和解析错误，并用同一标记回归。
mitigation.en: Remove dynamic evaluation and shell concatenation; use fixed APIs, argument arrays, allowed template IDs, and safe deserialization types. Keep upload and log storage non-executable and run with least privilege and isolation. Audit anomalous child processes, type loading, include paths, and parser errors, then regress with the same marker.

title.zh: 确认 PHP Filter 受控资源边界 的适用入口
title.en: Confirm the Applicable PHP Filter Controlled-Resource Boundary Entry Point

description.zh: 记录 PHP Filter 受控资源边界 的组件版本、输入位置、执行主体、正常请求与服务端日志，确认当前夹具满足该技术的真实前置条件。
description.en: Record the component version, input location, execution principal, normal request, and server logs for PHP Filter Controlled-Resource Boundary, confirming that the fixture satisfies its actual prerequisites.

title.zh: 运行 PHP Filter 受控资源边界 单一授权样例
title.en: Run One Authorized PHP Filter Controlled-Resource Boundary Sample

description.zh: 一次只运行第一条授权实验样例，并保存原始请求、响应、最终解析结果和对应日志；确认基线后再逐个验证其余变体。
description.en: Run only the first authorized-lab sample at a time and preserve the raw request, response, final parsed result, and matching logs; validate remaining variants one by one only after establishing the baseline.

title.zh: 关联 PHP Filter 受控资源边界 的服务端证据
title.en: Correlate Server-Side Evidence for PHP Filter Controlled-Resource Boundary

description.zh: 把唯一标记与解析器、代理、应用、数据库或浏览器证据按时间关联，并排除回显、缓存、重试、客户端修改和统一错误页。
description.en: Correlate the unique marker over time with parser, proxy, application, database, or browser evidence while excluding reflection, caching, retries, client modification, and generic error pages.

title.zh: 修复 PHP Filter 受控资源边界 并重放基线
title.en: Remediate PHP Filter Controlled-Resource Boundary and Replay the Baseline

description.zh: 应用最小边界修复后重放正常、标记和阴性样例，确认业务路径仍可用、服务端证据消失且没有引入新的解析差异。

A status code, timeout, error string, client display, or tool guess is only a lead; retain a negative control and exact version prerequisites.

opsecTips.en: Run one unique marker at a time and limit request count, retained response data, and experiment duration.

opsecTips.zh: 出现真实凭据、非实验数据、不可逆写入或非授权连接时立即停止并清理夹具。
opsecTips.en: Stop immediately and clean up the fixture on real credentials, non-lab data, irreversible writes, or unauthorized connections.

analysis.en: Unsafe Deserialization Type Boundary is confirmed only when the unique input, final parsing or authorization result, server-side logs, and observable impact agree. A status code, timeout, error string, client display, or tool guess is only a lead; retain a negative control and exact version prerequisites.

opsecTips.zh: 一次只运行一个唯一标记，并限制请求次数、响应保存范围和实验持续时间。
opsecTips.en: Run one unique marker at a time and limit request count, retained response data, and experiment duration.

opsecTips.zh: 出现真实凭据、非实验数据、不可逆写入或非授权连接时立即停止并清理夹具。
opsecTips.en: Stop immediately and clean up the fixture on real credentials, non-lab data, irreversible writes, or unauthorized connections.

review.rationale: 使用无副作用 PayloaderMarker 类型验证不可信数据能否选择运行时类型或回调，不加载真实 gadget。 保留原有合法攻击样例与变体，仅替换已证实的失效占位、协议错误或事实混淆，并补齐授权实验边界、检测证据、双语教程和权威引用。

name.zh: PHP 反序列化类型边界

description.zh: PHP 反序列化类型边界保留可复现的攻击样例与绕过变体，仅修正已确认失效、占位或事实混淆的内容。所有样例只用于可回滚的授权实验，并要求浏览器、解析器、代理或服务端日志与可见结果一致。
description.en: PHP Deserialization Type Boundary preserves reproducible attack samples and bypass variants while correcting only confirmed obsolete, placeholder, or factually conflated content. Every sample is restricted to a reversible authorized lab and requires browser, parser, proxy, or server logs to agree with the visible result.

subCategory.zh: PHP 反序列化类型边界

prerequisites.zh: 确认 PHP 反序列化类型边界 的目标、账号、数据、组件版本和停止条件均属于可回滚的授权实验范围。
prerequisites.en: Confirm that the target, accounts, data, component version, and stop conditions for PHP Deserialization Type Boundary are inside a reversible authorized lab scope.

prerequisites.zh: 准备正常输入、唯一标记、服务端日志和阴性对照；禁止扩展到非实验资产、真实凭据或不可回滚状态。
prerequisites.en: Prepare normal input, a unique marker, server logs, and a negative control; do not expand to non-lab assets, real credentials, or irreversible state.

overview.zh: PHP 反序列化类型边界聚焦以下边界：使用专用无副作用 PHP 测试类验证 allowed_classes 和魔术方法边界，不操作文件或进程。 审校保留原有可用攻击语法与技术变体，同时补充适用版本、授权实验范围、正常基线、检测证据和停止条件；只有已确认错误的样例才被替换。
overview.en: PHP Deserialization Type Boundary focuses on this boundary: Uses a dedicated side-effect-free PHP test class to validate allowed_classes and magic-method boundaries without touching files or processes. The review retains usable attack syntax and technical variants while adding version prerequisites, authorized-lab scope, normal baselines, detection evidence, and stop conditions; only confirmed incorrect samples are replaced.

vulnerability.zh: 风险来自不可信数据跨越字符串、模板、包含、反序列化或进程启动边界并被解释为代码、命令或运行时类型。确认必须区分输入回显、解析错误、可控计算、子进程创建和真正的权限影响。
vulnerability.en: Risk arises when untrusted data crosses a string, template, include, deserialization, or process-launch boundary and is interpreted as code, a command, or a runtime type. Confirmation must distinguish reflection, parser errors, controlled evaluation, child-process creation, and actual privilege impact.

exploitation.zh: 先用普通文本建立响应与日志基线，再执行只输出 PAYLOADER_RCE 固定标记或加载无副作用测试类型的样例。阳性必须由服务器端解释器、进程、类加载或模板日志与响应标记共同证明；不使用网络回连、敏感读取或持久化。
exploitation.en: Establish response and log baselines with plain text, then run a sample that only emits a fixed PAYLOADER_RCE marker or loads a side-effect-free test type. A positive result requires matching server-side interpreter, process, class-loading, or template logs plus the response marker, without callbacks, sensitive reads, or persistence.

mitigation.zh: 移除动态执行和 shell 拼接，使用固定 API、参数数组、允许模板 ID 与安全反序列化类型；上传和日志目录不可执行，运行账户采用最小权限与隔离。记录异常子进程、类型加载、包含路径和解析错误，并用同一标记回归。
mitigation.en: Remove dynamic evaluation and shell concatenation; use fixed APIs, argument arrays, allowed template IDs, and safe deserialization types. Keep upload and log storage non-executable and run with least privilege and isolation. Audit anomalous child processes, type loading, include paths, and parser errors, then regress with the same marker.

title.zh: 确认 PHP 反序列化类型边界 的适用入口
title.en: Confirm the Applicable PHP Deserialization Type Boundary Entry Point

description.zh: 记录 PHP 反序列化类型边界 的组件版本、输入位置、执行主体、正常请求与服务端日志，确认当前夹具满足该技术的真实前置条件。
description.en: Record the component version, input location, execution principal, normal request, and server logs for PHP Deserialization Type Boundary, confirming that the fixture satisfies its actual prerequisites.

title.zh: 运行 PHP 反序列化类型边界 单一授权样例
title.en: Run One Authorized PHP Deserialization Type Boundary Sample

description.zh: 一次只运行第一条授权实验样例，并保存原始请求、响应、最终解析结果和对应日志；确认基线后再逐个验证其余变体。
description.en: Run only the first authorized-lab sample at a time and preserve the raw request, response, final parsed result, and matching logs; validate remaining variants one by one only after establishing the baseline.

title.zh: 关联 PHP 反序列化类型边界 的服务端证据
title.en: Correlate Server-Side Evidence for PHP Deserialization Type Boundary

description.zh: 把唯一标记与解析器、代理、应用、数据库或浏览器证据按时间关联，并排除回显、缓存、重试、客户端修改和统一错误页。
description.en: Correlate the unique marker over time with parser, proxy, application, database, or browser evidence while excluding reflection, caching, retries, client modification, and generic error pages.

title.zh: 修复 PHP 反序列化类型边界 并重放基线
title.en: Remediate PHP Deserialization Type Boundary and Replay the Baseline

description.zh: 应用最小边界修复后重放正常、标记和阴性样例，确认业务路径仍可用、服务端证据消失且没有引入新的解析差异。
description.en: Apply the smallest boundary fix and replay normal, marker, and negative cases to confirm the business path remains available, server-side evidence disappears, and no new parsing difference is introduced.

opsecTips.en: Stop immediately and clean up the fixture on real credentials, non-lab data, irreversible writes, or unauthorized connections.

review.rationale: 只包含沙箱中的静态标记模板，确认规范化路径和允许模板 ID 是否限制实际文件。 保留原有合法攻击样例与变体，仅替换已证实的失效占位、协议错误或事实混淆，并补齐授权实验边界、检测证据、双语教程和权威引用。

name.zh: 日志到模板解释边界

description.zh: 日志到模板解释边界保留可复现的攻击样例与绕过变体，仅修正已确认失效、占位或事实混淆的内容。所有样例只用于可回滚的授权实验，并要求浏览器、解析器、代理或服务端日志与可见结果一致。
description.en: Log-to-Template Interpretation Boundary preserves reproducible attack samples and bypass variants while correcting only confirmed obsolete, placeholder, or factually conflated content. Every sample is restricted to a reversible authorized lab and requires browser, parser, proxy, or server logs to agree with the visible result.

subCategory.zh: 日志到模板解释边界

prerequisites.zh: 确认 日志到模板解释边界 的目标、账号、数据、组件版本和停止条件均属于可回滚的授权实验范围。
prerequisites.en: Confirm that the target, accounts, data, component version, and stop conditions for Log-to-Template Interpretation Boundary are inside a reversible authorized lab scope.

prerequisites.zh: 准备正常输入、唯一标记、服务端日志和阴性对照；禁止扩展到非实验资产、真实凭据或不可回滚状态。
prerequisites.en: Prepare normal input, a unique marker, server logs, and a negative control; do not expand to non-lab assets, real credentials, or irreversible state.

overview.zh: 日志到模板解释边界聚焦以下边界：把纯文本标记写入实验日志，再确认包含或查看路径是否错误地把日志内容当作代码。 审校保留原有可用攻击语法与技术变体，同时补充适用版本、授权实验范围、正常基线、检测证据和停止条件；只有已确认错误的样例才被替换。
overview.en: Log-to-Template Interpretation Boundary focuses on this boundary: Writes a plain marker to a lab log and tests whether an include or view path incorrectly treats log content as code. The review retains usable attack syntax and technical variants while adding version prerequisites, authorized-lab scope, normal baselines, detection evidence, and stop conditions; only confirmed incorrect samples are replaced.

vulnerability.zh: 风险来自不可信数据跨越字符串、模板、包含、反序列化或进程启动边界并被解释为代码、命令或运行时类型。确认必须区分输入回显、解析错误、可控计算、子进程创建和真正的权限影响。
vulnerability.en: Risk arises when untrusted data crosses a string, template, include, deserialization, or process-launch boundary and is interpreted as code, a command, or a runtime type. Confirmation must distinguish reflection, parser errors, controlled evaluation, child-process creation, and actual privilege impact.

exploitation.zh: 先用普通文本建立响应与日志基线，再执行只输出 PAYLOADER_RCE 固定标记或加载无副作用测试类型的样例。阳性必须由服务器端解释器、进程、类加载或模板日志与响应标记共同证明；不使用网络回连、敏感读取或持久化。
exploitation.en: Establish response and log baselines with plain text, then run a sample that only emits a fixed PAYLOADER_RCE marker or loads a side-effect-free test type. A positive result requires matching server-side interpreter, process, class-loading, or template logs plus the response marker, without callbacks, sensitive reads, or persistence.

mitigation.zh: 移除动态执行和 shell 拼接，使用固定 API、参数数组、允许模板 ID 与安全反序列化类型；上传和日志目录不可执行，运行账户采用最小权限与隔离。记录异常子进程、类型加载、包含路径和解析错误，并用同一标记回归。
mitigation.en: Remove dynamic evaluation and shell concatenation; use fixed APIs, argument arrays, allowed template IDs, and safe deserialization types. Keep upload and log storage non-executable and run with least privilege and isolation. Audit anomalous child processes, type loading, include paths, and parser errors, then regress with the same marker.

title.zh: 确认 日志到模板解释边界 的适用入口
title.en: Confirm the Applicable Log-to-Template Interpretation Boundary Entry Point

description.zh: 记录 日志到模板解释边界 的组件版本、输入位置、执行主体、正常请求与服务端日志，确认当前夹具满足该技术的真实前置条件。
description.en: Record the component version, input location, execution principal, normal request, and server logs for Log-to-Template Interpretation Boundary, confirming that the fixture satisfies its actual prerequisites.

title.zh: 运行 日志到模板解释边界 单一授权样例
title.en: Run One Authorized Log-to-Template Interpretation Boundary Sample

description.zh: 一次只运行第一条授权实验样例，并保存原始请求、响应、最终解析结果和对应日志；确认基线后再逐个验证其余变体。
description.en: Run only the first authorized-lab sample at a time and preserve the raw request, response, final parsed result, and matching logs; validate remaining variants one by one only after establishing the baseline.

title.zh: 关联 日志到模板解释边界 的服务端证据
title.en: Correlate Server-Side Evidence for Log-to-Template Interpretation Boundary

description.zh: 把唯一标记与解析器、代理、应用、数据库或浏览器证据按时间关联，并排除回显、缓存、重试、客户端修改和统一错误页。
description.en: Correlate the unique marker over time with parser, proxy, application, database, or browser evidence while excluding reflection, caching, retries, client modification, and generic error pages.

title.zh: 修复 日志到模板解释边界 并重放基线
title.en: Remediate Log-to-Template Interpretation Boundary and Replay the Baseline

description.zh: 应用最小边界修复后重放正常、标记和阴性样例，确认业务路径仍可用、服务端证据消失且没有引入新的解析差异。
description.en: Apply the smallest boundary fix and replay normal, marker, and negative cases to confirm the business path remains available, server-side evidence disappears, and no new parsing difference is introduced.

analysis.zh: 日志到模板解释边界只有在唯一输入、最终解析或授权结果、服务端日志和可观察影响相互一致时才能确认。单一状态码、超时、错误文本、客户端显示或工具猜测只应作为线索，必须保留阴性对照和版本条件。
analysis.en: Log-to-Template Interpretation Boundary is confirmed only when the unique input, final parsing or authorization result, server-side logs, and observable impact agree. A status code, timeout, error string, client display, or tool guess is only a lead; retain a negative control and exact version prerequisites.

opsecTips.zh: 一次只运行一个唯一标记，并限制请求次数、响应保存范围和实验持续时间。
opsecTips.en: Run one unique marker at a time and limit request count, retained response data, and experiment duration.

opsecTips.zh: 出现真实凭据、非实验数据、不可逆写入或非授权连接时立即停止并清理夹具。
opsecTips.en: Stop immediately and clean up the fixture on real credentials, non-lab data, irreversible writes, or unauthorized connections.

review.rationale: 把纯文本标记写入实验日志，再确认包含或查看路径是否错误地把日志内容当作代码。 保留原有合法攻击样例与变体，仅替换已证实的失效占位、协议错误或事实混淆，并补齐授权实验边界、检测证据、双语教程和权威引用。

overview.en: Web-Server Directory Configuration Boundary focuses on this boundary: Tests in an isolated virtual host whether an upload directory accepts per-directory configuration while mapping only a fixed marker content type. name.zh: XML 外部实体 OAST 验证

description.zh: XML 外部实体 OAST 验证保留可复现的攻击样例与绕过变体，仅修正已确认失效、占位或事实混淆的内容。所有样例只用于可回滚的授权实验，并要求浏览器、解析器、代理或服务端日志与可见结果一致。
description.en: XML External-Entity OAST Validation preserves reproducible attack samples and bypass variants while correcting only confirmed obsolete, placeholder, or factually conflated content. Every sample is restricted to a reversible authorized lab and requires browser, parser, proxy, or server logs to agree with the visible result.

subCategory.zh: XML 外部实体 OAST 验证

prerequisites.zh: 确认 XML 外部实体 OAST 验证 的目标、账号、数据、组件版本和停止条件均属于可回滚的授权实验范围。
prerequisites.en: Confirm that the target, accounts, data, component version, and stop conditions for XML External-Entity OAST Validation are inside a reversible authorized lab scope.

prerequisites.zh: 准备正常输入、唯一标记、服务端日志和阴性对照；禁止扩展到非实验资产、真实凭据或不可回滚状态。
prerequisites.en: Prepare normal input, a unique marker, server logs, and a negative control; do not expand to non-lab assets, real credentials, or irreversible state.

overview.zh: XML 外部实体 OAST 验证聚焦以下边界：使用自有 OAST 标记域确认解析器是否加载外部实体，不读取本地文件或云元数据。 审校保留原有可用攻击语法与技术变体，同时补充适用版本、授权实验范围、正常基线、检测证据和停止条件；只有已确认错误的样例才被替换。
overview.en: XML External-Entity OAST Validation focuses on this boundary: Uses an owned OAST marker domain to determine whether the parser loads an external entity without reading local files or cloud metadata. The review retains usable attack syntax and technical variants while adding version prerequisites, authorized-lab scope, normal baselines, detection evidence, and stop conditions; only confirmed incorrect samples are replaced.

vulnerability.zh: 风险来自解析不可信 XML 时允许 DTD、外部通用实体、参数实体或外部资源加载。解析器、库版本和文档容器决定真实行为，文件读取、SSRF、带外请求与代码执行是不同能力，不能由一个错误消息互相推导。
vulnerability.en: Risk arises when untrusted XML parsing permits DTDs, external general entities, parameter entities, or external resource loading. Parser, library version, and document container determine actual behavior; file reads, SSRF, out-of-band requests, and code execution are distinct capabilities and cannot be inferred from one error.

exploitation.zh: 使用唯一 PAYLOADER_XXE 标记、自有 HTTPS 接收端或 XML 沙箱文件运行单个样例，同时保存原始 XML、解析器配置、应用日志和接收端时间戳。只有实体内容进入输出或对应出站请求被同一事务关联时才确认，DOCTYPE 被接受并不等于实体已展开。
exploitation.en: Run one sample with a unique PAYLOADER_XXE marker, an owned HTTPS receiver, or an XML sandbox file while preserving raw XML, parser configuration, application logs, and receiver timestamps. Confirm only when entity content reaches output or a matching outbound request correlates to the transaction; accepting a DOCTYPE does not prove entity expansion.

mitigation.zh: 在所有 XML、SVG、SOAP 和 OOXML 导入路径禁用 DTD、外部实体与外部资源，使用安全解析器预设并限制出站网络与文件权限。对压缩文档限制大小、部件数量和解压比，并在修复后重放正常文档、DOCTYPE 阴性样例和标记样例。
mitigation.en: Disable DTDs, external entities, and external resources across XML, SVG, SOAP, and OOXML import paths; use secure parser presets and restrict egress plus filesystem permissions. Limit archive size, part count, and expansion ratio, then replay a normal document, a DOCTYPE negative case, and the marker case after remediation.

title.zh: 确认 XML 外部实体 OAST 验证 的适用入口
title.en: Confirm the Applicable XML External-Entity OAST Validation Entry Point

description.zh: 记录 XML 外部实体 OAST 验证 的组件版本、输入位置、执行主体、正常请求与服务端日志，确认当前夹具满足该技术的真实前置条件。
description.en: Record the component version, input location, execution principal, normal request, and server logs for XML External-Entity OAST Validation, confirming that the fixture satisfies its actual prerequisites.

title.zh: 运行 XML 外部实体 OAST 验证 单一授权样例
title.en: Run One Authorized XML External-Entity OAST Validation Sample

description.zh: 一次只运行第一条授权实验样例，并保存原始请求、响应、最终解析结果和对应日志；确认基线后再逐个验证其余变体。
description.en: Run only the first authorized-lab sample at a time and preserve the raw request, response, final parsed result, and matching logs; validate remaining variants one by one only after establishing the baseline.

title.zh: 关联 XML 外部实体 OAST 验证 的服务端证据
title.en: Correlate Server-Side Evidence for XML External-Entity OAST Validation

description.zh: 把唯一标记与解析器、代理、应用、数据库或浏览器证据按时间关联，并排除回显、缓存、重试、客户端修改和统一错误页。
description.en: Correlate the unique marker over time with parser, proxy, application, database, or browser evidence while excluding reflection, caching, retries, client modification, and generic error pages.

title.zh: 修复 XML 外部实体 OAST 验证 并重放基线
title.en: Remediate XML External-Entity OAST Validation and Replay the Baseline

description.zh: 应用最小边界修复后重放正常、标记和阴性样例，确认业务路径仍可用、服务端证据消失且没有引入新的解析差异。
description.en: Apply the smallest boundary fix and replay normal, marker, and negative cases to confirm the business path remains available, server-side evidence disappears, and no new parsing difference is introduced.

analysis.zh: XML 外部实体 OAST 验证只有在唯一输入、最终解析或授权结果、服务端日志和可观察影响相互一致时才能确认。单一状态码、超时、错误文本、客户端显示或工具猜测只应作为线索，必须保留阴性对照和版本条件。
analysis.en: XML External-Entity OAST Validation is confirmed only when the unique input, final parsing or authorization result, server-side logs, and observable impact agree. A status code, timeout, error string, client display, or tool guess is only a lead; retain a negative control and exact version prerequisites.

opsecTips.zh: 一次只运行一个唯一标记，并限制请求次数、响应保存范围和实验持续时间。
opsecTips.en: Run one unique marker at a time and limit request count, retained response data, and experiment duration.

opsecTips.zh: 出现真实凭据、非实验数据、不可逆写入或非授权连接时立即停止并清理夹具。
opsecTips.en: Stop immediately and clean up the fixture on real credentials, non-lab data, irreversible writes, or unauthorized connections.

review.rationale: 使用自有 OAST 标记域确认解析器是否加载外部实体，不读取本地文件或云元数据。 保留原有合法攻击样例与变体，仅替换已证实的失效占位、协议错误或事实混淆，并补齐授权实验边界、检测证据、双语教程和权威引用。

prerequisites.en: Confirm that the target, accounts, data, component version, and stop conditions for XXE-to-Controlled-HTTP Fixture Validation are inside a reversible authorized lab scope.

prerequisites.zh: 准备正常输入、唯一标记、服务端日志和阴性对照；禁止扩展到非实验资产、真实凭据或不可回滚状态。
prerequisites.en: Prepare normal input, a unique marker, server logs, and a negative control; do not expand to non-lab assets, real credentials, or irreversible state.

overview.zh: XXE 到受控 HTTP 夹具验证聚焦以下边界：把外部实体指向受控内部标记服务，验证解析器出站边界而不访问真实内网。 审校保留原有可用攻击语法与技术变体，同时补充适用版本、授权实验范围、正常基线、检测证据和停止条件；只有已确认错误的样例才被替换。
overview.en: XXE-to-Controlled-HTTP Fixture Validation focuses on this boundary: Points an external entity to a controlled internal marker service to test parser egress without accessing a real internal network. The review retains usable attack syntax and technical variants while adding version prerequisites, authorized-lab scope, normal baselines, detection evidence, and stop conditions; only confirmed incorrect samples are replaced.

vulnerability.zh: 风险来自解析不可信 XML 时允许 DTD、外部通用实体、参数实体或外部资源加载。解析器、库版本和文档容器决定真实行为，文件读取、SSRF、带外请求与代码执行是不同能力，不能由一个错误消息互相推导。
vulnerability.en: Risk arises when untrusted XML parsing permits DTDs, external general entities, parameter entities, or external resource loading. Parser, library version, and document container determine actual behavior; file reads, SSRF, out-of-band requests, and code execution are distinct capabilities and cannot be inferred from one error.

exploitation.zh: 使用唯一 PAYLOADER_XXE 标记、自有 HTTPS 接收端或 XML 沙箱文件运行单个样例，同时保存原始 XML、解析器配置、应用日志和接收端时间戳。只有实体内容进入输出或对应出站请求被同一事务关联时才确认，DOCTYPE 被接受并不等于实体已展开。
exploitation.en: Run one sample with a unique PAYLOADER_XXE marker, an owned HTTPS receiver, or an XML sandbox file while preserving raw XML, parser configuration, application logs, and receiver timestamps. Confirm only when entity content reaches output or a matching outbound request correlates to the transaction; accepting a DOCTYPE does not prove entity expansion.

mitigation.zh: 在所有 XML、SVG、SOAP 和 OOXML 导入路径禁用 DTD、外部实体与外部资源，使用安全解析器预设并限制出站网络与文件权限。对压缩文档限制大小、部件数量和解压比，并在修复后重放正常文档、DOCTYPE 阴性样例和标记样例。
mitigation.en: Disable DTDs, external entities, and external resources across XML, SVG, SOAP, and OOXML import paths; use secure parser presets and restrict egress plus filesystem permissions. Limit archive size, part count, and expansion ratio, then replay a normal document, a DOCTYPE negative case, and the marker case after remediation.

title.zh: 确认 XXE 到受控 HTTP 夹具验证 的适用入口
title.en: Confirm the Applicable XXE-to-Controlled-HTTP Fixture Validation Entry Point

description.zh: 记录 XXE 到受控 HTTP 夹具验证 的组件版本、输入位置、执行主体、正常请求与服务端日志，确认当前夹具满足该技术的真实前置条件。
description.en: Record the component version, input location, execution principal, normal request, and server logs for XXE-to-Controlled-HTTP Fixture Validation, confirming that the fixture satisfies its actual prerequisites.

title.zh: 运行 XXE 到受控 HTTP 夹具验证 单一授权样例
title.en: Run One Authorized XXE-to-Controlled-HTTP Fixture Validation Sample

description.zh: 一次只运行第一条授权实验样例，并保存原始请求、响应、最终解析结果和对应日志；确认基线后再逐个验证其余变体。
description.en: Run only the first authorized-lab sample at a time and preserve the raw request, response, final parsed result, and matching logs; validate remaining variants one by one only after establishing the baseline.

title.zh: 关联 XXE 到受控 HTTP 夹具验证 的服务端证据
title.en: Correlate Server-Side Evidence for XXE-to-Controlled-HTTP Fixture Validation

description.zh: 把唯一标记与解析器、代理、应用、数据库或浏览器证据按时间关联，并排除回显、缓存、重试、客户端修改和统一错误页。
description.en: Correlate the unique marker over time with parser, proxy, application, database, or browser evidence while excluding reflection, caching, retries, client modification, and generic error pages.

title.zh: 修复 XXE 到受控 HTTP 夹具验证 并重放基线
title.en: Remediate XXE-to-Controlled-HTTP Fixture Validation and Replay the Baseline

description.zh: 应用最小边界修复后重放正常、标记和阴性样例，确认业务路径仍可用、服务端证据消失且没有引入新的解析差异。
description.en: Apply the smallest boundary fix and replay normal, marker, and negative cases to confirm the business path remains available, server-side evidence disappears, and no new parsing difference is introduced.

analysis.zh: XXE 到受控 HTTP 夹具验证只有在唯一输入、最终解析或授权结果、服务端日志和可观察影响相互一致时才能确认。单一状态码、超时、错误文本、客户端显示或工具猜测只应作为线索，必须保留阴性对照和版本条件。
analysis.en: XXE-to-Controlled-HTTP Fixture Validation is confirmed only when the unique input, final parsing or authorization result, server-side logs, and observable impact agree. A status code, timeout, error string, client display, or tool guess is only a lead; retain a negative control and exact version prerequisites.

opsecTips.zh: 一次只运行一个唯一标记，并限制请求次数、响应保存范围和实验持续时间。
opsecTips.en: Run one unique marker at a time and limit request count, retained response data, and experiment duration.

opsecTips.zh: 出现真实凭据、非实验数据、不可逆写入或非授权连接时立即停止并清理夹具。
opsecTips.en: Stop immediately and clean up the fixture on real credentials, non-lab data, irreversible writes, or unauthorized connections.

review.rationale: 把外部实体指向受控内部标记服务，验证解析器出站边界而不访问真实内网。 保留原有合法攻击样例与变体，仅替换已证实的失效占位、协议错误或事实混淆，并补齐授权实验边界、检测证据、双语教程和权威引用。

name.zh: XXE 到代码执行主张校验

description.zh: XXE 到代码执行主张校验保留可复现的攻击样例与绕过变体，仅修正已确认失效、占位或事实混淆的内容。所有样例只用于可回滚的授权实验，并要求浏览器、解析器、代理或服务端日志与可见结果一致。
description.en: XXE-to-Code-Execution Claim Validation preserves reproducible attack samples and bypass variants while correcting only confirmed obsolete, placeholder, or factually conflated content. Every sample is restricted to a reversible authorized lab and requires browser, parser, proxy, or server logs to agree with the visible result.

subCategory.zh: XXE 到代码执行主张校验

The review retains usable attack syntax and technical variants while adding version prerequisites, authorized-lab scope, normal baselines, detection evidence, and stop conditions; only confirmed incorrect samples are replaced.

description.zh: XXE 沙箱文件实体验证保留可复现的攻击样例与绕过变体，仅修正已确认失效、占位或事实混淆的内容。所有样例只用于可回滚的授权实验，并要求浏览器、解析器、代理或服务端日志与可见结果一致。
