prerequisites.en: Prepare normal input, a unique marker, server logs, and a negative control; do not expand to non-lab assets, real credentials, or irreversible state.

overview.zh: 外部 DTD 加载边界验证聚焦以下边界：使用最小自有 DTD 和唯一标记验证参数实体加载，不嵌套文件读取或递归实体。 审校保留原有可用攻击语法与技术变体，同时补充适用版本、授权实验范围、正常基线、检测证据和停止条件；只有已确认错误的样例才被替换。
overview.en: External DTD Loading Boundary Validation focuses on this boundary: Uses a minimal owned DTD and unique marker to test parameter-entity loading without nested file reads or recursive entities. The review retains usable attack syntax and technical variants while adding version prerequisites, authorized-lab scope, normal baselines, detection evidence, and stop conditions; only confirmed incorrect samples are replaced.

vulnerability.zh: 风险来自解析不可信 XML 时允许 DTD、外部通用实体、参数实体或外部资源加载。解析器、库版本和文档容器决定真实行为，文件读取、SSRF、带外请求与代码执行是不同能力，不能由一个错误消息互相推导。
vulnerability.en: Risk arises when untrusted XML parsing permits DTDs, external general entities, parameter entities, or external resource loading. Parser, library version, and document container determine actual behavior; file reads, SSRF, out-of-band requests, and code execution are distinct capabilities and cannot be inferred from one error.

exploitation.zh: 使用唯一 PAYLOADER_XXE 标记、自有 HTTPS 接收端或 XML 沙箱文件运行单个样例，同时保存原始 XML、解析器配置、应用日志和接收端时间戳。只有实体内容进入输出或对应出站请求被同一事务关联时才确认，DOCTYPE 被接受并不等于实体已展开。
exploitation.en: Run one sample with a unique PAYLOADER_XXE marker, an owned HTTPS receiver, or an XML sandbox file while preserving raw XML, parser configuration, application logs, and receiver timestamps. Confirm only when entity content reaches output or a matching outbound request correlates to the transaction; accepting a DOCTYPE does not prove entity expansion.

mitigation.zh: 在所有 XML、SVG、SOAP 和 OOXML 导入路径禁用 DTD、外部实体与外部资源，使用安全解析器预设并限制出站网络与文件权限。对压缩文档限制大小、部件数量和解压比，并在修复后重放正常文档、DOCTYPE 阴性样例和标记样例。
mitigation.en: Disable DTDs, external entities, and external resources across XML, SVG, SOAP, and OOXML import paths; use secure parser presets and restrict egress plus filesystem permissions. Limit archive size, part count, and expansion ratio, then replay a normal document, a DOCTYPE negative case, and the marker case after remediation.

title.zh: 确认 外部 DTD 加载边界验证 的适用入口
title.en: Confirm the Applicable External DTD Loading Boundary Validation Entry Point

description.zh: 记录 外部 DTD 加载边界验证 的组件版本、输入位置、执行主体、正常请求与服务端日志，确认当前夹具满足该技术的真实前置条件。
description.en: Record the component version, input location, execution principal, normal request, and server logs for External DTD Loading Boundary Validation, confirming that the fixture satisfies its actual prerequisites.

title.zh: 运行 外部 DTD 加载边界验证 单一授权样例
title.en: Run One Authorized External DTD Loading Boundary Validation Sample

description.zh: 一次只运行第一条授权实验样例，并保存原始请求、响应、最终解析结果和对应日志；确认基线后再逐个验证其余变体。
description.en: Run only the first authorized-lab sample at a time and preserve the raw request, response, final parsed result, and matching logs; validate remaining variants one by one only after establishing the baseline.

title.zh: 关联 外部 DTD 加载边界验证 的服务端证据
title.en: Correlate Server-Side Evidence for External DTD Loading Boundary Validation

description.zh: 把唯一标记与解析器、代理、应用、数据库或浏览器证据按时间关联，并排除回显、缓存、重试、客户端修改和统一错误页。
description.en: Correlate the unique marker over time with parser, proxy, application, database, or browser evidence while excluding reflection, caching, retries, client modification, and generic error pages.

title.zh: 修复 外部 DTD 加载边界验证 并重放基线
title.en: Remediate External DTD Loading Boundary Validation and Replay the Baseline

description.zh: 应用最小边界修复后重放正常、标记和阴性样例，确认业务路径仍可用、服务端证据消失且没有引入新的解析差异。
description.en: Apply the smallest boundary fix and replay normal, marker, and negative cases to confirm the business path remains available, server-side evidence disappears, and no new parsing difference is introduced.

analysis.zh: 外部 DTD 加载边界验证只有在唯一输入、最终解析或授权结果、服务端日志和可观察影响相互一致时才能确认。单一状态码、超时、错误文本、客户端显示或工具猜测只应作为线索，必须保留阴性对照和版本条件。
analysis.en: External DTD Loading Boundary Validation is confirmed only when the unique input, final parsing or authorization result, server-side logs, and observable impact agree. A status code, timeout, error string, client display, or tool guess is only a lead; retain a negative control and exact version prerequisites.

opsecTips.zh: 一次只运行一个唯一标记，并限制请求次数、响应保存范围和实验持续时间。
opsecTips.en: Run one unique marker at a time and limit request count, retained response data, and experiment duration.

opsecTips.zh: 出现真实凭据、非实验数据、不可逆写入或非授权连接时立即停止并清理夹具。
opsecTips.en: Stop immediately and clean up the fixture on real credentials, non-lab data, irreversible writes, or unauthorized connections.

review.rationale: 使用最小自有 DTD 和唯一标记验证参数实体加载，不嵌套文件读取或递归实体。 保留原有合法攻击样例与变体，仅替换已证实的失效占位、协议错误或事实混淆，并补齐授权实验边界、检测证据、双语教程和权威引用。

overview.zh: ThinkPHP 版本与路由执行回归聚焦以下边界：先固定框架版本、路由和补丁状态，再用无害标记验证特定动态调用边界，不泛化到所有 ThinkPHP。 审校保留原有可用攻击语法与技术变体，同时补充适用版本、授权实验范围、正常基线、检测证据和停止条件；只有已确认错误的样例才被替换。
overview.en: ThinkPHP Version and Route-Execution Regression focuses on this boundary: Pins framework version, route, and patch status before using a harmless marker on a specific dynamic-call boundary without generalizing to every ThinkPHP deployment. The review retains usable attack syntax and technical variants while adding version prerequisites, authorized-lab scope, normal baselines, detection evidence, and stop conditions; only confirmed incorrect samples are replaced.

vulnerability.zh: 框架名称本身不是漏洞。有效结论必须绑定精确版本、启用组件、路由、配置和补丁状态，并证明不可信输入到达具体的 ORM、调试、签名、模板、反序列化或动态调用边界。不同 CVE 和配置问题不能拼成通用执行链。
vulnerability.en: A framework name is not a vulnerability. A valid conclusion binds the exact version, enabled component, route, configuration, and patch state and proves that untrusted input reaches a specific ORM, debug, signing, template, deserialization, or dynamic-call boundary. Different CVEs and configuration issues cannot be combined into one universal execution chain.

exploitation.zh: 在可回滚框架夹具中记录版本、依赖锁文件、路由与正常响应，再发送只返回 PAYLOADER_FRAMEWORK 标记的单变量样例。阳性需要版本条件、服务端堆栈或审计日志和标记结果一致；错误页、公开版本头或客户端响应修改均不足。
exploitation.en: Record version, dependency lock file, route, and normal response in a reversible framework fixture, then send one single-variable sample that returns only a PAYLOADER_FRAMEWORK marker. A positive result requires matching version prerequisites, server stack or audit logs, and marker output; an error page, public version header, or client-side response edit is insufficient.

mitigation.zh: 升级到供应商支持版本并应用安全补丁，关闭生产调试与动态调用，保护签名密钥，限制允许类型、路由参数和静态文件根目录。将依赖版本与安全配置纳入 CI，并使用相同正常和标记请求验证业务保留且边界差异消失。
mitigation.en: Upgrade to a vendor-supported release and apply security patches; disable production debug and dynamic calls; protect signing keys; and constrain allowed types, route parameters, and static roots. Gate dependency versions and security settings in CI, then replay the same normal and marker requests to preserve behavior while removing the boundary difference.

title.zh: 确认 ThinkPHP 版本与路由执行回归 的适用入口
title.en: Confirm the Applicable ThinkPHP Version and Route-Execution Regression Entry Point

description.zh: 记录 ThinkPHP 版本与路由执行回归 的组件版本、输入位置、执行主体、正常请求与服务端日志，确认当前夹具满足该技术的真实前置条件。
description.en: Record the component version, input location, execution principal, normal request, and server logs for ThinkPHP Version and Route-Execution Regression, confirming that the fixture satisfies its actual prerequisites.

title.zh: 运行 ThinkPHP 版本与路由执行回归 单一授权样例
title.en: Run One Authorized ThinkPHP Version and Route-Execution Regression Sample

description.zh: 一次只运行第一条授权实验样例，并保存原始请求、响应、最终解析结果和对应日志；确认基线后再逐个验证其余变体。
description.en: Run only the first authorized-lab sample at a time and preserve the raw request, response, final parsed result, and matching logs; validate remaining variants one by one only after establishing the baseline.

title.zh: 关联 ThinkPHP 版本与路由执行回归 的服务端证据
title.en: Correlate Server-Side Evidence for ThinkPHP Version and Route-Execution Regression

description.zh: 把唯一标记与解析器、代理、应用、数据库或浏览器证据按时间关联，并排除回显、缓存、重试、客户端修改和统一错误页。
description.en: Correlate the unique marker over time with parser, proxy, application, database, or browser evidence while excluding reflection, caching, retries, client modification, and generic error pages.

title.zh: 修复 ThinkPHP 版本与路由执行回归 并重放基线
title.en: Remediate ThinkPHP Version and Route-Execution Regression and Replay the Baseline

description.zh: 应用最小边界修复后重放正常、标记和阴性样例，确认业务路径仍可用、服务端证据消失且没有引入新的解析差异。
description.en: Apply the smallest boundary fix and replay normal, marker, and negative cases to confirm the business path remains available, server-side evidence disappears, and no new parsing difference is introduced.

analysis.zh: ThinkPHP 版本与路由执行回归只有在唯一输入、最终解析或授权结果、服务端日志和可观察影响相互一致时才能确认。单一状态码、超时、错误文本、客户端显示或工具猜测只应作为线索，必须保留阴性对照和版本条件。
analysis.en: ThinkPHP Version and Route-Execution Regression is confirmed only when the unique input, final parsing or authorization result, server-side logs, and observable impact agree. A status code, timeout, error string, client display, or tool guess is only a lead; retain a negative control and exact version prerequisites.

opsecTips.zh: 一次只运行一个唯一标记，并限制请求次数、响应保存范围和实验持续时间。
opsecTips.en: Run one unique marker at a time and limit request count, retained response data, and experiment duration.

opsecTips.zh: 出现真实凭据、非实验数据、不可逆写入或非授权连接时立即停止并清理夹具。
opsecTips.en: Stop immediately and clean up the fixture on real credentials, non-lab data, irreversible writes, or unauthorized connections.

review.rationale: 先固定框架版本、路由和补丁状态，再用无害标记验证特定动态调用边界，不泛化到所有 ThinkPHP。 保留原有合法攻击样例与变体，仅替换已证实的失效占位、协议错误或事实混淆，并补齐授权实验边界、检测证据、双语教程和权威引用。

name.zh: Laravel 配置与反序列化回归

description.zh: Laravel 配置与反序列化回归保留可复现的攻击样例与绕过变体，仅修正已确认失效、占位或事实混淆的内容。所有样例只用于可回滚的授权实验，并要求浏览器、解析器、代理或服务端日志与可见结果一致。
description.en: Laravel Configuration and Deserialization Regression preserves reproducible attack samples and bypass variants while correcting only confirmed obsolete, placeholder, or factually conflated content. Every sample is restricted to a reversible authorized lab and requires browser, parser, proxy, or server logs to agree with the visible result.

subCategory.zh: Laravel 配置与反序列化回归

prerequisites.zh: 确认 Laravel 配置与反序列化回归 的目标、账号、数据、组件版本和停止条件均属于可回滚的授权实验范围。
prerequisites.en: Confirm that the target, accounts, data, component version, and stop conditions for Laravel Configuration and Deserialization Regression are inside a reversible authorized lab scope.

prerequisites.zh: 准备正常输入、唯一标记、服务端日志和阴性对照；禁止扩展到非实验资产、真实凭据或不可回滚状态。
prerequisites.en: Prepare normal input, a unique marker, server logs, and a negative control; do not expand to non-lab assets, real credentials, or irreversible state.

overview.zh: Laravel 配置与反序列化回归聚焦以下边界：核对 Laravel 版本、APP_KEY 暴露、调试模式和反序列化入口，并只运行无害框架夹具。 审校保留原有可用攻击语法与技术变体，同时补充适用版本、授权实验范围、正常基线、检测证据和停止条件；只有已确认错误的样例才被替换。
overview.en: Laravel Configuration and Deserialization Regression focuses on this boundary: Reviews Laravel version, APP_KEY exposure, debug mode, and deserialization entry points while running only a harmless framework fixture. The review retains usable attack syntax and technical variants while adding version prerequisites, authorized-lab scope, normal baselines, detection evidence, and stop conditions; only confirmed incorrect samples are replaced.

prerequisites.en: Prepare normal input, a unique marker, server logs, and a negative control; do not expand to non-lab assets, real credentials, or irreversible state.

overview.zh: Web 缓存键与响应变体验证聚焦以下边界：使用唯一无害响应头标记确认未键入输入能否改变共享缓存对象，不注入脚本或影响其他用户。 审校保留原有可用攻击语法与技术变体，同时补充适用版本、授权实验范围、正常基线、检测证据和停止条件；只有已确认错误的样例才被替换。
overview.en: Web Cache-Key and Response-Variant Validation focuses on this boundary: Uses a unique harmless response-header marker to test whether an unkeyed input changes a shared cached object without injecting script or affecting other users. The review retains usable attack syntax and technical variants while adding version prerequisites, authorized-lab scope, normal baselines, detection evidence, and stop conditions; only confirmed incorrect samples are replaced.

vulnerability.zh: 风险来自缓存键和源站响应变体不一致，或缓存层与应用对路径、认证和私有响应的解释不同。单次 X-Cache、Age 或响应变化只能说明缓存行为，只有无会话客户端收到同一标记或私有变体时才构成跨用户影响。
vulnerability.en: Risk arises when cache keys omit origin response variants or when the cache and application disagree on paths, authentication, or private responses. One X-Cache, Age, or response change shows caching behavior only; cross-user impact requires a no-session client to receive the same marker or private variant.

exploitation.zh: 为专用测试路由生成唯一 PAYLOADER_CACHE 标记，按 miss、hit、不同会话和无会话顺序请求，并保存 Cache-Control、Vary、Age、缓存键日志和响应哈希。使用不含隐私的固定正文，发现共享污染后立即 purge，禁止影响真实用户。
exploitation.en: Generate a unique PAYLOADER_CACHE marker for a dedicated test route and request it in miss, hit, different-session, and no-session order, preserving Cache-Control, Vary, Age, cache-key logs, and response hashes. Use a privacy-free fixed body, purge immediately on shared contamination, and do not affect real users.

mitigation.zh: 让缓存键覆盖所有影响响应的已规范化输入，拒绝未批准的转发头，对认证和个性化响应设置 private/no-store 并正确使用 Vary。统一 CDN 与源站路径规范化，限制可缓存状态和扩展名，部署后 purge 旧对象并重复多会话回归。
mitigation.en: Include every normalized input that affects the response in the cache key, reject unapproved forwarding headers, mark authenticated and personalized responses private or no-store, and use Vary correctly. Align CDN and origin path normalization, constrain cacheable statuses and extensions, purge old objects after deployment, and repeat multi-session regression.

title.zh: 确认 Web 缓存键与响应变体验证 的适用入口
title.en: Confirm the Applicable Web Cache-Key and Response-Variant Validation Entry Point

description.zh: 记录 Web 缓存键与响应变体验证 的组件版本、输入位置、执行主体、正常请求与服务端日志，确认当前夹具满足该技术的真实前置条件。
description.en: Record the component version, input location, execution principal, normal request, and server logs for Web Cache-Key and Response-Variant Validation, confirming that the fixture satisfies its actual prerequisites.

title.zh: 运行 Web 缓存键与响应变体验证 单一授权样例
title.en: Run One Authorized Web Cache-Key and Response-Variant Validation Sample

description.zh: 一次只运行第一条授权实验样例，并保存原始请求、响应、最终解析结果和对应日志；确认基线后再逐个验证其余变体。
description.en: Run only the first authorized-lab sample at a time and preserve the raw request, response, final parsed result, and matching logs; validate remaining variants one by one only after establishing the baseline.

title.zh: 关联 Web 缓存键与响应变体验证 的服务端证据
title.en: Correlate Server-Side Evidence for Web Cache-Key and Response-Variant Validation

description.zh: 把唯一标记与解析器、代理、应用、数据库或浏览器证据按时间关联，并排除回显、缓存、重试、客户端修改和统一错误页。
description.en: Correlate the unique marker over time with parser, proxy, application, database, or browser evidence while excluding reflection, caching, retries, client modification, and generic error pages.

title.zh: 修复 Web 缓存键与响应变体验证 并重放基线
title.en: Remediate Web Cache-Key and Response-Variant Validation and Replay the Baseline

description.zh: 应用最小边界修复后重放正常、标记和阴性样例，确认业务路径仍可用、服务端证据消失且没有引入新的解析差异。
description.en: Apply the smallest boundary fix and replay normal, marker, and negative cases to confirm the business path remains available, server-side evidence disappears, and no new parsing difference is introduced.

analysis.zh: Web 缓存键与响应变体验证只有在唯一输入、最终解析或授权结果、服务端日志和可观察影响相互一致时才能确认。单一状态码、超时、错误文本、客户端显示或工具猜测只应作为线索，必须保留阴性对照和版本条件。
analysis.en: Web Cache-Key and Response-Variant Validation is confirmed only when the unique input, final parsing or authorization result, server-side logs, and observable impact agree. A status code, timeout, error string, client display, or tool guess is only a lead; retain a negative control and exact version prerequisites.

opsecTips.zh: 一次只运行一个唯一标记，并限制请求次数、响应保存范围和实验持续时间。
opsecTips.en: Run one unique marker at a time and limit request count, retained response data, and experiment duration.

opsecTips.zh: 出现真实凭据、非实验数据、不可逆写入或非授权连接时立即停止并清理夹具。
opsecTips.en: Stop immediately and clean up the fixture on real credentials, non-lab data, irreversible writes, or unauthorized connections.

review.rationale: 使用唯一无害响应头标记确认未键入输入能否改变共享缓存对象，不注入脚本或影响其他用户。 保留原有合法攻击样例与变体，仅替换已证实的失效占位、协议错误或事实混淆，并补齐授权实验边界、检测证据、双语教程和权威引用。

name.zh: Web 缓存私有响应隔离验证

description.zh: Web 缓存私有响应隔离验证保留可复现的攻击样例与绕过变体，仅修正已确认失效、占位或事实混淆的内容。所有样例只用于可回滚的授权实验，并要求浏览器、解析器、代理或服务端日志与可见结果一致。
description.en: Web Cache Private-Response Isolation Validation preserves reproducible attack samples and bypass variants while correcting only confirmed obsolete, placeholder, or factually conflated content. overview.en: Web Cache Private-Response Isolation Validation focuses on this boundary: Uses a dedicated account and privacy-free marker response to test whether path parsing differences cause an authenticated page to enter a shared cache. The review retains usable attack syntax and technical variants while adding version prerequisites, authorized-lab scope, normal baselines, detection evidence, and stop conditions; only confirmed incorrect samples are replaced.

name.zh: HTTP CL-TE 消息边界回归

description.zh: HTTP CL-TE 消息边界回归保留可复现的攻击样例与绕过变体，仅修正已确认失效、占位或事实混淆的内容。所有样例只用于可回滚的授权实验，并要求浏览器、解析器、代理或服务端日志与可见结果一致。
description.en: HTTP CL-TE Message-Boundary Regression preserves reproducible attack samples and bypass variants while correcting only confirmed obsolete, placeholder, or factually conflated content. Every sample is restricted to a reversible authorized lab and requires browser, parser, proxy, or server logs to agree with the visible result.

subCategory.zh: HTTP CL-TE 消息边界回归

prerequisites.zh: 确认 HTTP CL-TE 消息边界回归 的目标、账号、数据、组件版本和停止条件均属于可回滚的授权实验范围。
prerequisites.en: Confirm that the target, accounts, data, component version, and stop conditions for HTTP CL-TE Message-Boundary Regression are inside a reversible authorized lab scope.

prerequisites.zh: 准备正常输入、唯一标记、服务端日志和阴性对照；禁止扩展到非实验资产、真实凭据或不可回滚状态。
prerequisites.en: Prepare normal input, a unique marker, server logs, and a negative control; do not expand to non-lab assets, real credentials, or irreversible state.

overview.zh: HTTP CL-TE 消息边界回归聚焦以下边界：在单用户实验代理链中发送一个带冲突 CL/TE 的固定标记请求，验证两端是否一致拒绝。 审校保留原有可用攻击语法与技术变体，同时补充适用版本、授权实验范围、正常基线、检测证据和停止条件；只有已确认错误的样例才被替换。
overview.en: HTTP CL-TE Message-Boundary Regression focuses on this boundary: Sends one fixed-marker request with conflicting CL and TE through a single-user lab proxy chain to verify consistent rejection at both hops. The review retains usable attack syntax and technical variants while adding version prerequisites, authorized-lab scope, normal baselines, detection evidence, and stop conditions; only confirmed incorrect samples are replaced.

vulnerability.zh: 请求走私来自同一持久连接上的两个 HTTP 组件对消息长度或字段规范化得出不同边界。RFC 9112 要求 Transfer-Encoding 覆盖 Content-Length，并要求拒绝不可恢复的歧义；一个 curl 状态码、服务器类型或单端超时不能证明前后端不同步。
vulnerability.en: Request smuggling arises when two HTTP components on one persistent connection derive different message boundaries from length or field normalization. RFC 9112 makes Transfer-Encoding override Content-Length and requires rejection of unrecoverable ambiguity; one curl status, server type, or single-hop timeout does not prove desynchronization.

exploitation.zh: 只在单用户实验代理链向 echo 后端发送一个 PAYLOADER_SMUGGLE 标记歧义请求，记录前端、后端和连接级日志以及请求计数。阳性必须证明一个输入在两端被分成不同数量或长度的请求；不发送管理路径，不等待或影响下一位用户请求。
exploitation.en: Send one PAYLOADER_SMUGGLE ambiguity marker only through a single-user lab proxy chain to an echo backend, recording front-end, backend, connection logs, and request counts. A positive result must prove that one input became a different request count or length at the two hops; do not target administrative paths or wait for another user request.

mitigation.zh: 在边缘统一使用严格 HTTP 解析，拒绝重复或冲突的长度字段、非法 Transfer-Encoding 和含糊空白，避免不安全的协议降级，并在转发前重建规范请求。升级所有代理和服务器，修复后重放正常请求与每个歧义阴性样例。
mitigation.en: Use strict HTTP parsing at the edge; reject duplicate or conflicting length fields, invalid Transfer-Encoding, and ambiguous whitespace; avoid unsafe protocol downgrades; and reconstruct canonical requests before forwarding. Upgrade every proxy and server, then replay normal requests and every ambiguity negative case.

title.en: Confirm the Applicable HTTP CL-TE Message-Boundary Regression Entry Point

A status code, timeout, error string, client display, or tool guess is only a lead; retain a negative control and exact version prerequisites.

name.zh: HTTP 重复 Content-Length 拒绝回归

description.zh: HTTP 重复 Content-Length 拒绝回归保留可复现的攻击样例与绕过变体，仅修正已确认失效、占位或事实混淆的内容。所有样例只用于可回滚的授权实验，并要求浏览器、解析器、代理或服务端日志与可见结果一致。

Every sample is restricted to a reversible authorized lab and requires browser, parser, proxy, or server logs to agree with the visible result.

subCategory.zh: HTTP 重复 Content-Length 拒绝回归

prerequisites.zh: 确认 HTTP 重复 Content-Length 拒绝回归 的目标、账号、数据、组件版本和停止条件均属于可回滚的授权实验范围。

prerequisites.en: Prepare normal input, a unique marker, server logs, and a negative control; do not expand to non-lab assets, real credentials, or irreversible state.

overview.zh: HTTP 重复 Content-Length 拒绝回归聚焦以下边界：依据 RFC 9112 验证不同 Content-Length 值是否被整条代理链拒绝，不尝试访问管理路径。 审校保留原有可用攻击语法与技术变体，同时补充适用版本、授权实验范围、正常基线、检测证据和停止条件；只有已确认错误的样例才被替换。
overview.en: HTTP Duplicate Content-Length Rejection Regression focuses on this boundary: Uses RFC 9112 expectations to verify that differing Content-Length values are rejected across the proxy chain without targeting an administrative path. The review retains usable attack syntax and technical variants while adding version prerequisites, authorized-lab scope, normal baselines, detection evidence, and stop conditions; only confirmed incorrect samples are replaced.

vulnerability.zh: 请求走私来自同一持久连接上的两个 HTTP 组件对消息长度或字段规范化得出不同边界。RFC 9112 要求 Transfer-Encoding 覆盖 Content-Length，并要求拒绝不可恢复的歧义；一个 curl 状态码、服务器类型或单端超时不能证明前后端不同步。
vulnerability.en: Request smuggling arises when two HTTP components on one persistent connection derive different message boundaries from length or field normalization. RFC 9112 makes Transfer-Encoding override Content-Length and requires rejection of unrecoverable ambiguity; one curl status, server type, or single-hop timeout does not prove desynchronization.

exploitation.zh: 只在单用户实验代理链向 echo 后端发送一个 PAYLOADER_SMUGGLE 标记歧义请求，记录前端、后端和连接级日志以及请求计数。阳性必须证明一个输入在两端被分成不同数量或长度的请求；不发送管理路径，不等待或影响下一位用户请求。
exploitation.en: Send one PAYLOADER_SMUGGLE ambiguity marker only through a single-user lab proxy chain to an echo backend, recording front-end, backend, connection logs, and request counts. A positive result must prove that one input became a different request count or length at the two hops; do not target administrative paths or wait for another user request.

mitigation.zh: 在边缘统一使用严格 HTTP 解析，拒绝重复或冲突的长度字段、非法 Transfer-Encoding 和含糊空白，避免不安全的协议降级，并在转发前重建规范请求。升级所有代理和服务器，修复后重放正常请求与每个歧义阴性样例。
mitigation.en: Use strict HTTP parsing at the edge; reject duplicate or conflicting length fields, invalid Transfer-Encoding, and ambiguous whitespace; avoid unsafe protocol downgrades; and reconstruct canonical requests before forwarding. Upgrade every proxy and server, then replay normal requests and every ambiguity negative case.

title.zh: 确认 HTTP 重复 Content-Length 拒绝回归 的适用入口
title.en: Confirm the Applicable HTTP Duplicate Content-Length Rejection Regression Entry Point

description.zh: 记录 HTTP 重复 Content-Length 拒绝回归 的组件版本、输入位置、执行主体、正常请求与服务端日志，确认当前夹具满足该技术的真实前置条件。
description.en: Record the component version, input location, execution principal, normal request, and server logs for HTTP Duplicate Content-Length Rejection Regression, confirming that the fixture satisfies its actual prerequisites.

title.zh: 运行 HTTP 重复 Content-Length 拒绝回归 单一授权样例
title.en: Run One Authorized HTTP Duplicate Content-Length Rejection Regression Sample

description.zh: 一次只运行第一条授权实验样例，并保存原始请求、响应、最终解析结果和对应日志；确认基线后再逐个验证其余变体。
description.en: Run only the first authorized-lab sample at a time and preserve the raw request, response, final parsed result, and matching logs; validate remaining variants one by one only after establishing the baseline.

title.zh: 关联 HTTP 重复 Content-Length 拒绝回归 的服务端证据
title.en: Correlate Server-Side Evidence for HTTP Duplicate Content-Length Rejection Regression

description.zh: 把唯一标记与解析器、代理、应用、数据库或浏览器证据按时间关联，并排除回显、缓存、重试、客户端修改和统一错误页。
description.en: Correlate the unique marker over time with parser, proxy, application, database, or browser evidence while excluding reflection, caching, retries, client modification, and generic error pages.

title.zh: 修复 HTTP 重复 Content-Length 拒绝回归 并重放基线
title.en: Remediate HTTP Duplicate Content-Length Rejection Regression and Replay the Baseline

description.zh: 应用最小边界修复后重放正常、标记和阴性样例，确认业务路径仍可用、服务端证据消失且没有引入新的解析差异。
description.en: Apply the smallest boundary fix and replay normal, marker, and negative cases to confirm the business path remains available, server-side evidence disappears, and no new parsing difference is introduced.

analysis.zh: HTTP 重复 Content-Length 拒绝回归只有在唯一输入、最终解析或授权结果、服务端日志和可观察影响相互一致时才能确认。单一状态码、超时、错误文本、客户端显示或工具猜测只应作为线索，必须保留阴性对照和版本条件。
analysis.en: HTTP Duplicate Content-Length Rejection Regression is confirmed only when the unique input, final parsing or authorization result, server-side logs, and observable impact agree. A status code, timeout, error string, client display, or tool guess is only a lead; retain a negative control and exact version prerequisites.

opsecTips.zh: 一次只运行一个唯一标记，并限制请求次数、响应保存范围和实验持续时间。
opsecTips.en: Run one unique marker at a time and limit request count, retained response data, and experiment duration.

opsecTips.zh: 出现真实凭据、非实验数据、不可逆写入或非授权连接时立即停止并清理夹具。
opsecTips.en: Stop immediately and clean up the fixture on real credentials, non-lab data, irreversible writes, or unauthorized connections.

review.rationale: 依据 RFC 9112 验证不同 Content-Length 值是否被整条代理链拒绝，不尝试访问管理路径。 保留原有合法攻击样例与变体，仅替换已证实的失效占位、协议错误或事实混淆，并补齐授权实验边界、检测证据、双语教程和权威引用。

name.zh: HTTP TE-CL 消息边界回归

description.zh: HTTP TE-CL 消息边界回归保留可复现的攻击样例与绕过变体，仅修正已确认失效、占位或事实混淆的内容。所有样例只用于可回滚的授权实验，并要求浏览器、解析器、代理或服务端日志与可见结果一致。
description.en: HTTP TE-CL Message-Boundary Regression preserves reproducible attack samples and bypass variants while correcting only confirmed obsolete, placeholder, or factually conflated content. description.zh: HTTP 重复 Transfer-Encoding 回归保留可复现的攻击样例与绕过变体，仅修正已确认失效、占位或事实混淆的内容。所有样例只用于可回滚的授权实验，并要求浏览器、解析器、代理或服务端日志与可见结果一致。

overview.zh: 对象级授权跨账号验证聚焦以下边界：仅使用两个专用实验账号和一个固定对象，验证主体、对象与动作是否在服务端重新绑定。 审校保留原有可用攻击语法与技术变体，同时补充适用版本、授权实验范围、正常基线、检测证据和停止条件；只有已确认错误的样例才被替换。
overview.en: Cross-Account Object-Level Authorization Validation focuses on this boundary: Uses only two dedicated lab accounts and one fixed object to test whether subject, object, and action are rebound on the server. The review retains usable attack syntax and technical variants while adding version prerequisites, authorized-lab scope, normal baselines, detection evidence, and stop conditions; only confirmed incorrect samples are replaced.

vulnerability.zh: 业务风险来自服务器信任客户端对象标识、金额、状态、并发顺序或验证结果，而没有在每次请求中重新绑定主体、对象、动作和允许状态转换。客户端字段可修改或响应可拦截本身不是漏洞，必须出现服务器端未授权结果。
vulnerability.en: Business risk arises when the server trusts client object identifiers, amounts, state, concurrency order, or verification results without rebinding subject, object, action, and allowed transition on every request. Editable fields or intercepted responses alone are not vulnerabilities; an unauthorized server-side outcome is required.

exploitation.zh: 使用两个专用账号、固定沙箱对象和唯一 PAYLOADER_BUSINESS 标记记录正常基线，再只改变一个对象、金额、状态或顺序变量。阳性需要数据库状态、账本、审计日志或后续读取证明未授权结果；前端显示、HTTP 200 或修改客户端响应均不足。
exploitation.en: Use two dedicated accounts, a fixed sandbox object, and a unique PAYLOADER_BUSINESS marker to record a normal baseline, then change only one object, amount, state, or ordering variable. A positive result requires database state, ledger, audit logs, or a follow-up read proving an unauthorized outcome; UI display, HTTP 200, or a modified client response is insufficient.

mitigation.zh: 在服务端逐请求执行对象级授权，从可信目录和价格规则重算结果，对敏感状态转换使用事务、唯一约束、幂等键和一次性令牌，并对验证码与重置令牌绑定主体、用途、时效和尝试次数。对异常状态转换与重复消费建立审计。
mitigation.en: Enforce object-level authorization on every request, recalculate outcomes from trusted catalogs and pricing rules, use transactions, unique constraints, idempotency keys, and one-time tokens for sensitive transitions, and bind CAPTCHA plus reset tokens to subject, purpose, lifetime, and attempt limits. Audit abnormal transitions and duplicate consumption.

title.zh: 确认 对象级授权跨账号验证 的适用入口
title.en: Confirm the Applicable Cross-Account Object-Level Authorization Validation Entry Point

description.zh: 记录 对象级授权跨账号验证 的组件版本、输入位置、执行主体、正常请求与服务端日志，确认当前夹具满足该技术的真实前置条件。
description.en: Record the component version, input location, execution principal, normal request, and server logs for Cross-Account Object-Level Authorization Validation, confirming that the fixture satisfies its actual prerequisites.

title.zh: 运行 对象级授权跨账号验证 单一授权样例
title.en: Run One Authorized Cross-Account Object-Level Authorization Validation Sample

description.zh: 一次只运行第一条授权实验样例，并保存原始请求、响应、最终解析结果和对应日志；确认基线后再逐个验证其余变体。
description.en: Run only the first authorized-lab sample at a time and preserve the raw request, response, final parsed result, and matching logs; validate remaining variants one by one only after establishing the baseline.

title.zh: 关联 对象级授权跨账号验证 的服务端证据
title.en: Correlate Server-Side Evidence for Cross-Account Object-Level Authorization Validation

description.zh: 把唯一标记与解析器、代理、应用、数据库或浏览器证据按时间关联，并排除回显、缓存、重试、客户端修改和统一错误页。
description.en: Correlate the unique marker over time with parser, proxy, application, database, or browser evidence while excluding reflection, caching, retries, client modification, and generic error pages.

title.zh: 修复 对象级授权跨账号验证 并重放基线
title.en: Remediate Cross-Account Object-Level Authorization Validation and Replay the Baseline

description.zh: 应用最小边界修复后重放正常、标记和阴性样例，确认业务路径仍可用、服务端证据消失且没有引入新的解析差异。
description.en: Apply the smallest boundary fix and replay normal, marker, and negative cases to confirm the business path remains available, server-side evidence disappears, and no new parsing difference is introduced.

analysis.zh: 对象级授权跨账号验证只有在唯一输入、最终解析或授权结果、服务端日志和可观察影响相互一致时才能确认。单一状态码、超时、错误文本、客户端显示或工具猜测只应作为线索，必须保留阴性对照和版本条件。
analysis.en: Cross-Account Object-Level Authorization Validation is confirmed only when the unique input, final parsing or authorization result, server-side logs, and observable impact agree. A status code, timeout, error string, client display, or tool guess is only a lead; retain a negative control and exact version prerequisites.

opsecTips.zh: 一次只运行一个唯一标记，并限制请求次数、响应保存范围和实验持续时间。
opsecTips.en: Run one unique marker at a time and limit request count, retained response data, and experiment duration.

opsecTips.zh: 出现真实凭据、非实验数据、不可逆写入或非授权连接时立即停止并清理夹具。
opsecTips.en: Stop immediately and clean up the fixture on real credentials, non-lab data, irreversible writes, or unauthorized connections.

review.rationale: 仅使用两个专用实验账号和一个固定对象，验证主体、对象与动作是否在服务端重新绑定。 保留原有合法攻击样例与变体，仅替换已证实的失效占位、协议错误或事实混淆，并补齐授权实验边界、检测证据、双语教程和权威引用。

name.zh: 业务状态并发原子性验证

description.zh: 业务状态并发原子性验证保留可复现的攻击样例与绕过变体，仅修正已确认失效、占位或事实混淆的内容。所有样例只用于可回滚的授权实验，并要求浏览器、解析器、代理或服务端日志与可见结果一致。
description.en: Business-State Concurrency Atomicity Validation preserves reproducible attack samples and bypass variants while correcting only confirmed obsolete, placeholder, or factually conflated content. Every sample is restricted to a reversible authorized lab and requires browser, parser, proxy, or server logs to agree with the visible result.

subCategory.zh: 业务状态并发原子性验证

prerequisites.zh: 确认 业务状态并发原子性验证 的目标、账号、数据、组件版本和停止条件均属于可回滚的授权实验范围。
prerequisites.en: Confirm that the target, accounts, data, component version, and stop conditions for Business-State Concurrency Atomicity Validation are inside a reversible authorized lab scope.

prerequisites.zh: 准备正常输入、唯一标记、服务端日志和阴性对照；禁止扩展到非实验资产、真实凭据或不可回滚状态。
prerequisites.en: Prepare normal input, a unique marker, server logs, and a negative control; do not expand to non-lab assets, real credentials, or irreversible state.

overview.zh: 业务状态并发原子性验证聚焦以下边界：最多并发两个可回滚实验请求，验证限额、余额或状态转换是否由原子事务保护。 审校保留原有可用攻击语法与技术变体，同时补充适用版本、授权实验范围、正常基线、检测证据和停止条件；只有已确认错误的样例才被替换。
overview.en: Business-State Concurrency Atomicity Validation focuses on this boundary: Runs at most two reversible lab requests concurrently to test whether limits, balances, or state transitions are protected atomically. The review retains usable attack syntax and technical variants while adding version prerequisites, authorized-lab scope, normal baselines, detection evidence, and stop conditions; only confirmed incorrect samples are replaced.

A positive result requires database state, ledger, audit logs, or a follow-up read proving an unauthorized outcome; UI display, HTTP 200, or a modified client response is insufficient.

description.zh: 支付金额服务端重算验证保留可复现的攻击样例与绕过变体，仅修正已确认失效、占位或事实混淆的内容。所有样例只用于可回滚的授权实验，并要求浏览器、解析器、代理或服务端日志与可见结果一致。

Every sample is restricted to a reversible authorized lab and requires browser, parser, proxy, or server logs to agree with the visible result.

overview.zh: 密码重置令牌绑定验证聚焦以下边界：使用自有测试邮箱验证令牌的一次性、时效、账号绑定和可信链接来源，不枚举或爆破验证码。 审校保留原有可用攻击语法与技术变体，同时补充适用版本、授权实验范围、正常基线、检测证据和停止条件；只有已确认错误的样例才被替换。
overview.en: Password-Reset Token Binding Validation focuses on this boundary: Uses an owned test mailbox to validate one-time use, expiry, account binding, and trusted link origin without enumerating or brute-forcing codes. The review retains usable attack syntax and technical variants while adding version prerequisites, authorized-lab scope, normal baselines, detection evidence, and stop conditions; only confirmed incorrect samples are replaced.

vulnerability.zh: 业务风险来自服务器信任客户端对象标识、金额、状态、并发顺序或验证结果，而没有在每次请求中重新绑定主体、对象、动作和允许状态转换。客户端字段可修改或响应可拦截本身不是漏洞，必须出现服务器端未授权结果。
vulnerability.en: Business risk arises when the server trusts client object identifiers, amounts, state, concurrency order, or verification results without rebinding subject, object, action, and allowed transition on every request. Editable fields or intercepted responses alone are not vulnerabilities; an unauthorized server-side outcome is required.

exploitation.zh: 使用两个专用账号、固定沙箱对象和唯一 PAYLOADER_BUSINESS 标记记录正常基线，再只改变一个对象、金额、状态或顺序变量。阳性需要数据库状态、账本、审计日志或后续读取证明未授权结果；前端显示、HTTP 200 或修改客户端响应均不足。
exploitation.en: Use two dedicated accounts, a fixed sandbox object, and a unique PAYLOADER_BUSINESS marker to record a normal baseline, then change only one object, amount, state, or ordering variable. A positive result requires database state, ledger, audit logs, or a follow-up read proving an unauthorized outcome; UI display, HTTP 200, or a modified client response is insufficient.

mitigation.zh: 在服务端逐请求执行对象级授权，从可信目录和价格规则重算结果，对敏感状态转换使用事务、唯一约束、幂等键和一次性令牌，并对验证码与重置令牌绑定主体、用途、时效和尝试次数。对异常状态转换与重复消费建立审计。
mitigation.en: Enforce object-level authorization on every request, recalculate outcomes from trusted catalogs and pricing rules, use transactions, unique constraints, idempotency keys, and one-time tokens for sensitive transitions, and bind CAPTCHA plus reset tokens to subject, purpose, lifetime, and attempt limits. Audit abnormal transitions and duplicate consumption.

title.zh: 确认 密码重置令牌绑定验证 的适用入口
title.en: Confirm the Applicable Password-Reset Token Binding Validation Entry Point

description.zh: 记录 密码重置令牌绑定验证 的组件版本、输入位置、执行主体、正常请求与服务端日志，确认当前夹具满足该技术的真实前置条件。
description.en: Record the component version, input location, execution principal, normal request, and server logs for Password-Reset Token Binding Validation, confirming that the fixture satisfies its actual prerequisites.

title.zh: 运行 密码重置令牌绑定验证 单一授权样例
title.en: Run One Authorized Password-Reset Token Binding Validation Sample

description.zh: 一次只运行第一条授权实验样例，并保存原始请求、响应、最终解析结果和对应日志；确认基线后再逐个验证其余变体。
description.en: Run only the first authorized-lab sample at a time and preserve the raw request, response, final parsed result, and matching logs; validate remaining variants one by one only after establishing the baseline.

title.zh: 关联 密码重置令牌绑定验证 的服务端证据
title.en: Correlate Server-Side Evidence for Password-Reset Token Binding Validation

description.zh: 把唯一标记与解析器、代理、应用、数据库或浏览器证据按时间关联，并排除回显、缓存、重试、客户端修改和统一错误页。
description.en: Correlate the unique marker over time with parser, proxy, application, database, or browser evidence while excluding reflection, caching, retries, client modification, and generic error pages.

title.zh: 修复 密码重置令牌绑定验证 并重放基线
title.en: Remediate Password-Reset Token Binding Validation and Replay the Baseline

description.zh: 应用最小边界修复后重放正常、标记和阴性样例，确认业务路径仍可用、服务端证据消失且没有引入新的解析差异。
description.en: Apply the smallest boundary fix and replay normal, marker, and negative cases to confirm the business path remains available, server-side evidence disappears, and no new parsing difference is introduced.

analysis.zh: 密码重置令牌绑定验证只有在唯一输入、最终解析或授权结果、服务端日志和可观察影响相互一致时才能确认。单一状态码、超时、错误文本、客户端显示或工具猜测只应作为线索，必须保留阴性对照和版本条件。
analysis.en: Password-Reset Token Binding Validation is confirmed only when the unique input, final parsing or authorization result, server-side logs, and observable impact agree. A status code, timeout, error string, client display, or tool guess is only a lead; retain a negative control and exact version prerequisites.

opsecTips.zh: 一次只运行一个唯一标记，并限制请求次数、响应保存范围和实验持续时间。
opsecTips.en: Run one unique marker at a time and limit request count, retained response data, and experiment duration.

opsecTips.zh: 出现真实凭据、非实验数据、不可逆写入或非授权连接时立即停止并清理夹具。
opsecTips.en: Stop immediately and clean up the fixture on real credentials, non-lab data, irreversible writes, or unauthorized connections.

review.rationale: 使用自有测试邮箱验证令牌的一次性、时效、账号绑定和可信链接来源，不枚举或爆破验证码。 保留原有合法攻击样例与变体，仅替换已证实的失效占位、协议错误或事实混淆，并补齐授权实验边界、检测证据、双语教程和权威引用。

name.zh: 验证码服务端消费验证

description.zh: 验证码服务端消费验证保留可复现的攻击样例与绕过变体，仅修正已确认失效、占位或事实混淆的内容。所有样例只用于可回滚的授权实验，并要求浏览器、解析器、代理或服务端日志与可见结果一致。
description.en: Server-Side CAPTCHA Consumption Validation preserves reproducible attack samples and bypass variants while correcting only confirmed obsolete, placeholder, or factually conflated content. Every sample is restricted to a reversible authorized lab and requires browser, parser, proxy, or server logs to agree with the visible result.

subCategory.zh: 验证码服务端消费验证

prerequisites.zh: 确认 验证码服务端消费验证 的目标、账号、数据、组件版本和停止条件均属于可回滚的授权实验范围。
prerequisites.en: Confirm that the target, accounts, data, component version, and stop conditions for Server-Side CAPTCHA Consumption Validation are inside a reversible authorized lab scope.

prerequisites.zh: 准备正常输入、唯一标记、服务端日志和阴性对照；禁止扩展到非实验资产、真实凭据或不可回滚状态。
prerequisites.en: Prepare normal input, a unique marker, server logs, and a negative control; do not expand to non-lab assets, real credentials, or irreversible state.

overview.zh: 验证码服务端消费验证聚焦以下边界：使用一个专用验证码 ID 和一次正确/一次错误对照，验证服务端绑定、过期与单次消费。 审校保留原有可用攻击语法与技术变体，同时补充适用版本、授权实验范围、正常基线、检测证据和停止条件；只有已确认错误的样例才被替换。
overview.en: Server-Side CAPTCHA Consumption Validation focuses on this boundary: Uses one dedicated CAPTCHA ID with one valid and one invalid control to test server-side binding, expiry, and single consumption. The review retains usable attack syntax and technical variants while adding version prerequisites, authorized-lab scope, normal baselines, detection evidence, and stop conditions; only confirmed incorrect samples are replaced.

A positive result requires database state, ledger, audit logs, or a follow-up read proving an unauthorized outcome; UI display, HTTP 200, or a modified client response is insufficient.
